definition.en: The barriers are yours. The barriers are camouflage. It is ridiculous to develop camouflage vehicles to deal with camouflage space, when all that is necessary is that you realize that camouflage is camouflage. Therefore the barrier disappears.
definition.zh: 障碍是你自己的。障碍就是伪装。当唯一必要的是你认识到伪装就是伪装时，却去发展伪装工具来对付伪装空间，这是荒谬的。因此障碍就消失了。

definition.en: Your outer senses are themselves camouflages to deal with, and equipped to perceive, camouflages.
definition.zh: 你们的外在感官本身就是伪装，用以处理并装备去感知伪装。

definition.en: The outer senses do not deal with direct perception of reality. The outer senses themselves are camouflage patterns, part of the necessary and essential physical body camouflage.
definition.zh: 外在感官并不处理对实相的直接感知。外在感官本身就是伪装模式，是必要且本质的肉体伪装的一部分。

definition.en: The whole self as you know has its existence in uncamouflaged energy, and is therefore capable of the assimilation of knowledge in so far as it can, if it chooses, be basically unaffiliated to any one camouflage dimension or perspective.
definition.zh: 你所知的整个自己在非伪装能量中存有，因此能够吸收知识，只要它选择的话，基本上可以不受任何单一伪装维度或视角的束缚。

definition.en: When it is understood that space and time are both camouflages, and that your cause and effect theory is a result of a continuity theory that no longer makes sense, then your scientists will recognize the impossibility of trying to decipher basic reality with camouflage instruments, and vehicles, that of themselves produce distortive theories, and only serve to probe further into a camouflage pattern.
definition.zh: 当人们理解空间和时间都是伪装，而你们的因果理论是一种不再合理的连续性理论的结果时，你们的科学家就会认识到，试图用伪装仪器和工具来解读基本实相是不可能的，这些工具本身就会产生扭曲的理论，只会进一步深入探索伪装模式。

explanation: 「伪装 / 伪装系统」是赛斯用来描述我们所感知的物质现实的核心概念。它并非指虚假或欺骗，而是指内在生命力、意识与能量在特定层面上自我显现、自我组织成可被物理感官捕捉的形态。我们所见的岩石、身体、时间、空间，甚至时钟上的数字，都是这种“伪装”。物理感官本身也是伪装的一部分，它们像特制的透镜，将无限的能量场“翻译”成三维空间中的固态物体和线性时间。真正的实相——那个充满活力、不断扩展的内在宇宙——并不存在于空间或时间中，而是隐藏在伪装之下。艺术创作、超感官知觉或心理时间的运用，能让人暂时穿透伪装，瞥见背后的真实。关键在于，伪装是真实的，但并非终极真实；它是由无数微小意识交织而成的活的心理网络，

quotes.text: Nevertheless it also partakes of the strange unity that unites all personalities beneath the camouflage pattern, while at the same time it is only partially connected to the camouflage pattern. In some respects art creations are a meeting of the dream world and the world of camouflage patterns, but in a deeper way art creations represent the appearance or materialization in the actual element of physical time of inner realities. That is, the inner individualistic self forces its vision and knowledge into the world of camouflage pattern, giving its dreams a physical reality denied to the usual dream. And here the use of energy for this purpose is conscious, that is the strong hidden self actually makes use of the camouflage conscious self and molds the two into a reality that combines two planes. This I hope will become clear as you read it over.
quotes.translation: 然而它也参与了那奇特的统一性，这统一性将伪装模式下的所有人格联结在一起，同时它又与伪装模式仅部分相连。在某些方面，艺术创作是梦境世界与伪装模式世界的交汇，但更深层而言，艺术创作代表了内在实相在物理时间的实际元素中的显现或物质化。也就是说，内在的个体化自我将其愿景与知识强行注入伪装模式的世界，赋予其梦境一种寻常梦境所不具备的物理实相。而在此处，能量为此目的的使用是有意识的，即那个强大的隐藏自我实际上利用了有意识的伪装自我，并将两者塑造成一个结合了两个层面的实相。我希望你多读几遍后能明白这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Even for example, levitation is involved with camouflage to a large degree, in that the camouflage physical body itself rises, but we are still here using the camouflage physical form. Traveling without the camouflage physical form is a giant step, of course, but a possible one according to your development. Here you are traveling however through camouflage space. It is very difficult on your level to do without any camouflage, and yet it can be done; and here again the use of psychological time is extremely important, since when psychological time is utilized to its fullest extent, then camouflage becomes lessened to an almost astounding degree.
quotes.translation: 即便以悬浮为例，它在很大程度上也涉及伪装，因为伪装的身体本身会升起，但我们仍在此处使用伪装的身体形态。脱离伪装的身体形态进行旅行当然是一个巨大的飞跃，但根据你的发展程度，这是可能的。然而在此处，你是在穿越伪装的空间旅行。在你的层面上，完全不借助任何伪装是非常困难的，但确实可以做到；而在此处，心理时间的运用极为重要，因为当心理时间被充分利用到极致时，伪装会减弱到几乎令人惊叹的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This basic universe of which I speak expands constantly in terms of intensity and quality and value, in a way that has nothing to do with your idea of space. The basic universe beneath all camouflage does not have an existence in space at all, as you envision it. Space is a camouflage ... This tinge of time is an attribute of the physical camouflage form only, and even then the relationship between time and ideas, and time and dreams, is a nebulous one ... although in some instances parts of the inner universe may be glimpsed from the camouflage perspective of time; only, however, a small portion.
quotes.translation: 我所谈论的这个基本宇宙，在强度、品质和价值方面不断扩展，其方式与你们对空间的概念毫无关联。所有伪装之下的基本宇宙根本不存在于你们所设想的空间之中。空间是一种伪装……这种时间的色调仅是物理伪装形态的一个属性，即便如此，时间与观念、时间与梦境之间的关系也是模糊不清的……尽管在某些情况下，从时间的伪装视角可以瞥见内在宇宙的部分，但仅能窥见一小部分。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now at times I will be using the term "camouflage," referring to the physical world to which the outer ego relates, for physical form is one of the camouflages that reality adopts. The camouflage is real, and yet there is a much greater reality within it -- the vitality that gave it form. Your physical senses then allow you to perceive this camouflage, for they are attuned to it in a highly specialized manner. But to sense the reality within the form requires a different sort of attention, and more delicate manipulations than the physical senses provide.
quotes.translation: 现在有时我会使用"伪装"这个术语，指的是外在自我所关联的物质世界，因为物质形态是实相所采用的伪装之一。这种伪装是真实的，但其内部存在着更伟大的实相——赋予它形态的生命力。你们的物质感官让你们得以感知这种伪装，因为它们以高度专门化的方式与之协调。但要感知形态内部的实相，则需要一种不同的注意力，以及比物质感官所提供的更为精微的操作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Even here there are gradations. Consider again Ruburt in one room with his eyes closed, "seeing" the time by a clock in the other room. This clairvoyance is of the easier variety, and yet represents an important step in his development, and should in your own. He was concerned with a camouflage idea, that of time, and clock time at that, the clock itself being a camouflage. Clairvoyantly he merely disentangled himself enough to ignore some camouflage in order to perceive camouflage that lay behind it, and this is a necessary first step.
quotes.translation: 即使在这里也存在层次之分。再想想鲁柏在另一个房间里闭着眼睛，"看见"另一个房间时钟上的时间。这种千里眼属于较容易的类型，却代表了他发展中的重要一步，也应是你们自己的重要一步。他关注的是一个伪装概念，即时间的概念，而且是钟表时间，钟表本身也是一种伪装。通过千里眼，他仅仅足够摆脱自身，忽略某些伪装，以便感知其背后的伪装，这是必要的第一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The settings in your physical environment, the sometimes lovely paraphernalia, the physical aspects of life as you know it, are all camouflages, and so I call your physical reality a camouflage. Yet these camouflages are composed of the vitality of the universe. The rocks and stones and mountains and earth are living camouflage, interlocking psychic webs formed by minute consciousnesses that you cannot perceive as such. The atoms and molecules within them have their own consciousness, as do the atoms and molecules with your body.
quotes.translation: 你们物质环境中的场景，那些有时可爱的陈设，你们所知的物质生活面向，全都是伪装，因此我称你们的物质实相为一种伪装。然而这些伪装是由宇宙的生命力构成的。岩石、石头、山脉和大地都是活生生的伪装，是由你们无法直接感知的微小意识所构成的相互锁定的心灵网络。它们内部的原子和分子拥有自己的意识，正如你们身体内的原子和分子一样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is this ability which is ever a strong force on your plane, having to do with the building up of particular elements, atoms, neurons and so forth, into camouflage patterns. On your plane you must use this organizing ability to form the camouflage pattern. There are planes with much simpler camouflage patterns, and some inhabited by personalities too weak or limited in this ability, and others inhabited by personalities strong in this ability to use energy, but who no longer need to use it in such a camouflage pattern.
quotes.translation: 这种能力始终是你们层面上的强大力量，与将特定元素、原子、神经元等构建成伪装模式有关。在你们层面上，你必须运用这种组织能力来形成伪装模式。有些层面的伪装模式简单得多，有些层面居住着在这种能力上过于薄弱或受限的人格，而另一些层面则居住着善于运用能量的人格，但他们已不再需要以这种伪装模式来运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am not going to give you any lessons for levitation, any more than I gave Ruburt lessons in clairvoyance. Your own development and your own rate of assimilation will be the rule, as far as the movement of camouflage objects through camouflage space is concerned. Again, you are dealing with camouflage. You move camouflage objects through the use of your inner senses constantly without your own conscious knowledge. The trick is not to learn how, but to recognize the occurrence, and with practice this is possible.
quotes.translation: 我不会教你们任何悬浮技巧，就像我从未教过鲁柏透视能力一样。就伪装物体在伪装空间中的移动而言，你们自身的发展与吸收速率将成为准则。再次强调，你们面对的是伪装。你们不断通过内在感官移动伪装物体，却毫无自觉意识。诀窍不在于学习如何做到，而在于辨识这种发生，通过练习这是可能的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Within him there are methods of perception that allow him to see through the camouflage settings, to see beyond the stage. He uses these inner senses constantly, though the actor part of himself is so intent upon the play that this escapes him. In a large manner, the physical senses actually form the physical reality they seem to only perceive. They are themselves part of the camouflage, but they are like lenses over your natural inner perceptions that force you to "see" an available field of activity as physical matter; and so they can be relied upon only to tell you what is happening in a superficial manner. You can tell the position of the other actors for example, or time by clock, but these physical senses will not tell you that time is itself a camouflage, or that consciousness forms the other actors, or that realities that you cannot see exist over and beyond the physical matter that is so apparent.
quotes.translation: 在他之内存在着感知方法，能让他看穿伪装布景，看见舞台之外。他持续运用这些内在感官，尽管他作为演员的那部分如此专注于戏剧而忽略了这一点。从广义上说，物质感官实际上形成了它们似乎仅能感知的物质实相。它们本身就是伪装的一部分，却如同覆盖在你们自然内在感知上的透镜，迫使你们将可感知的活动场域"看作"物质形态；因此你们只能依赖它们以肤浅的方式告知正在发生的事。例如你能判断其他演员的位置或时钟显示的时间，但这些物质感官不会告诉你时间本身就是伪装，不会告诉你意识形成了其他演员，也不会告诉你那些你们看不见的实相存在于如此显眼的物质之外。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: What is required is more than a shedding of clothes, however. To plunge into this ocean you also leave the physical body at the shore. It will be there when you get back. Your camouflage patterns can be likened to those cast by sun and shadow upon the ever-moving waves. As long as you keep the pattern in mind, you create it, and it is there. If you turn your head away for a moment and then look quickly back you can see only the wave. Your camouflage and your world are created by conscious focusing and unconscious concentration. Only by turning your head aside momentarily can you see what is beneath the seemingly solid pattern. By plunging into our ocean of value climate you can dive beneath your camouflage system and look up to see it, relatively foundationless, floating above you, moved, formed, and directed by the shifting illusions caused by the wind of will, and the force of subconscious concentration and demand.
quotes.translation: 然而，所需的不只是脱去衣物。要跃入这片海洋，你还得将肉体留在岸边——待你归来时它自会在原处。你们的伪装模式可比作日影在永动波涛上投下的光影。只要你心中存有这模式，你便创造它，它便存在。若你转瞬移开目光又猛然回望，便只能看见波浪本身。你们的伪装与世界的创造，源于有意识的聚焦与无意识的专注。唯有在转头的刹那，才能窥见看似坚固的模式之下隐藏的真相。跃入我们价值气候的海洋，你便能潜入伪装系统之下，仰望它相对无根地悬浮于你之上，被意志之风、潜意识专注与需求之力所掀起的变幻幻象所驱动、塑造与指引。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I risk repeating myself, but I want these steps to be plain. This vital data is sent to the mind by the inner senses. Any material that is important for the body's contact with outer camouflage patterns is given to the brain. The subconscious, so-called, is a connective between mind and brain, between the inner senses and the outer senses. It is actually partly on your plane and partly on other planes. Portions of it do deal with camouflage patterns, with the personal past of the present personality, with racial camouflage memories; and the greater portion belongs to the inner world, and as data comes into it from the inner world, so can it reach far into the inner world itself.
quotes.translation: 我甘冒重复之险，但求这些步骤清晰明了。这关键信息由内在感官传至心智。任何与肉体接触外在伪装模式相关的重要素材，皆被赋予大脑。所谓的潜意识，是心智与大脑、内在感官与外在感官之间的连接体。它实则部分存在于你的层面，部分存在于其他层面。其部分确实处理伪装模式、当前人格的个人过往、种族伪装记忆；而更大部分则属于内在世界——当信息从内在世界流入其中，它亦能深入内在世界本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: So the inner senses and the subconscious can do the same thing as far as inner space, and what you would call inner time, is concerned. But this is not amazing, far from it. It only seems strange because you are so familiar with your precious camouflage patterns. Time and space, dear friends, are both camouflage patterns, therefore the fact that the inner senses can conquer time and space is not, after all, so surprising. To the mind with its subconscious, and to the inner senses, there is no time and space, and therefore to them nothing is conquered. The camouflage is simply not present.
quotes.translation: 因此，就内在空间与你们所谓的内在时间而言，内在感官与潜意识亦能行同样之事。但这并不神奇，远非如此。它之所以显得奇异，只因你们过于熟悉珍贵的伪装模式。亲爱的朋友们，时间与空间皆为伪装模式——故而内在感官能超越时空，终究不足为奇。对于拥有潜意识的心智与内在感官而言，本无时空存在，因此对它们而言亦无超越可言。伪装根本不曾存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The barriers are yours. The barriers are camouflage. It is ridiculous to develop camouflage vehicles to deal with camouflage space, when all that is necessary is that you realize that camouflage is camouflage. Therefore the barrier disappears. We will have much more to say along these lines. When you realize that time as you know it does not exist, then vehicles become unnecessary.
quotes.translation: 障碍是你们自己制造的。障碍是伪装。当你们只需要认识到伪装就是伪装时，却发展出伪装载具来应对伪装空间，这实在荒谬。因此障碍便消失了。关于这一点我们还有更多要说的。当你们认识到你们所认知的时间并不存在时，载具就变得没有必要了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your particular camouflage pattern is given to solids, among other things, and the idea of solids gives its alternative of something not solid or unfilled, which you call space. Your outer senses are themselves camouflages to deal with, and equipped to perceive, camouflages. On some other planes the camouflage pattern is so different as to be beyond your present comprehension.
quotes.translation: 你们特定的伪装模式赋予固体物质以特性，而固体的概念又衍生出非固体或未填充的替代物——你们称之为空间。你们的外在感官本身就是伪装，用以处理并配备感知伪装。在其他某些层面，伪装模式截然不同，远非你们目前所能理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: If the dream world, the mind, and the inner universe do exist, but not in space, and if they do not exist basically in time, though they may be glimpsed through time, then your question will be: In what medium or in what manner do they exist, and without time, how can they be said to exist in duration? I am telling you that the basic universe exists behind all camouflage universes in the same manner, and taking up no space, that the mind exists behind the brain. The brain is a camouflage pattern. It takes up space. It exists in time, but the mind takes up no space and does not have its basic existence in time. Your camouflage universe, on the other hand, takes up space and exists in time.
quotes.translation: 如果梦境世界、心智和内在宇宙确实存在，但不在空间中；如果它们本质上不存在于时间里，尽管可能透过时间被瞥见，那么你们会问：它们存在于何种媒介或方式中？没有时间，又如何能说它们持续存在？我要告诉你们，基本宇宙以同样的方式存在于所有伪装宇宙背后，不占据任何空间，正如心智存在于大脑背后。大脑是一种伪装模式。它占据空间，存在于时间中，但心智不占据空间，其基本存在也不在时间里。而你们的伪装宇宙则相反，它占据空间并存在于时间中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Einstein used the miraculous aspects of his mind. Parts of the mind are almost completely undistorted. The mind is distributed throughout the whole physical body. The mind builds up about it the physical camouflages necessary for existence on your physical plane. The mind receives data from the inner senses and forms the camouflage necessary. The mind unconsciously or unselfconsciously deals with the basic laws according to the camouflage effect that is vital for survival on your physical plane. The mind is the tool which must be used.
quotes.translation: 爱因斯坦运用了他心智的神奇面向。心智的某些部分几乎完全未被扭曲。心智遍布整个物质身体。心智在其周围构建了你们物质层面生存所必需的物质伪装。心智接收来自内在感官的数据，并形成必要的伪装。心智无意识或不自觉地根据对你们物质层面生存至关重要的伪装效应来处理基本法则。心智是必须使用的工具。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The brain deals exclusively with camouflage patterns, transforming vitality into physical environmental camouflage patterns. The mind deals with basic principles inherent on all planes. The brain is itself part of the camouflage pattern, and can be interpreted and probed by physical instruments. The mind cannot be probed by physical instruments. It cannot even be found by physical instruments. The mind is the connective. It is here that the secrets of the universe will be discovered, and the mind itself is the tool of discovery.
quotes.translation: 大脑只处理伪装模式，将生命力转化为物质环境的伪装模式。心智处理所有层面固有的基本原则。大脑本身是伪装模式的一部分，可以用物理仪器进行解读和探测。心智无法用物理仪器探测，甚至无法用物理仪器找到。心智是连接者。宇宙的秘密将在这里被发现，而心智本身就是发现的工具。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The fact is, that even in your own universe all of your camouflage forms are not perceived by any one species, your own included. At best your scientists will only discover more of these camouflage patterns, but the entire system will simply not be perceived by any one species, and you will never perceive camouflage patterns outside of your own patterns. You are simply blocked in the pursuit of knowledge beyond a certain point as long as your scientists persist in the lines of their present development.
quotes.translation: 事实是，即使在你们自己的宇宙中，所有伪装形式也并非被任何一个物种所感知，包括你们自己的物种在内。你们的科学家最多只会发现更多这些伪装模式，但整个系统根本不会被任何一个物种所感知，而你们也永远无法感知自身模式之外的伪装模式。只要你们的科学家坚持目前的发展路线，你们在知识追求上就会被阻挡在某个临界点之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is on your part more than anything else, a simple refusal to admit into existence anything that is not a camouflage pattern. Camouflage patterns are of course, with again some exceptions, essentials on any plane, since each type represents the actual form of the plane and the various characteristics within it. Nevertheless it is possible, and actually much more efficient and simple, to accept this fact and also realize and admit the inner vitality behind the camouflage.
quotes.translation: 对你们而言，这主要是一种简单的拒绝——拒绝承认任何非伪装模式的存在。当然，除了一些例外情况，伪装模式在任何层面上都是必要的，因为每种类型都代表了该层面的实际形态及其内在的各种特征。然而，接受这一事实，同时认识并承认伪装背后的内在活力，是可能的，而且实际上更高效、更简单。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The outer senses do not deal with direct perception of reality. The outer senses themselves are camouflage patterns, part of the necessary and essential physical body camouflage. They, the outer senses, are perceptron of camouflage patterns. They were developed on your level, to deal with your world. They are useless outside of your world. They are useless in themselves as far as enabling you to perceive inner reality. This is not their function.
quotes.translation: 外在感官并不处理对实相的直接感知。外在感官本身就是伪装模式，是必要且本质的肉体伪装的一部分。它们，即外在感官，是对伪装模式的感知器。它们是在你们的层面上发展出来的，用以处理你们的世界。它们在你们的世界之外毫无用处。就使你们能够感知内在实相而言，它们本身是无用的。这不是它们的功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The movement through space is a distortion. I expect to say much more about this in further sessions, as it is extremely important; and you can see now perhaps why our eighth sense, disentanglement, is so important, since the inner self must disentangle itself from a particular camouflage before it can change. It must ignore, so to speak, one set of camouflage and be able to either adopt another smoothly or to dispense with camouflage entirely.
quotes.translation: 穿越空间的运动是一种扭曲。我预计在未来的课程中会对此有更多阐述，因为它极为重要；现在你们或许能明白为什么我们的第八感——解脱——如此重要，因为内在自我必须先从一个特定的伪装中解脱出来，才能进行转变。可以说，它必须忽略一组伪装，并能够要么平稳地采用另一组，要么完全摒弃伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have added here the addition of water to air, yet they are composed of the same elements. The elements are the blocks which build our camouflage. Air and water have many forms even on your plane. The elements change position constantly to transform the inner vitality or fuel from one camouflage pattern to another. Then why is it so difficult to understand that this happens on other planes and under different camouflage sequences?
quotes.translation: 我在此补充了水加入空气的例子，然而它们由相同元素构成。这些元素是构建我们伪装系统的积木。即使在你们的层面上，空气与水也有多种形态。元素不断变换位置，将内在生命力或燃料从一种伪装模式转化为另一种。那么，为何难以理解这种情况同样发生在其他层面及不同伪装序列中？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: [Many of] the flying saucer appearances come from [such] a plane, [one] that is much more advanced in technological sciences than earth at this time. However, this is still not a mental-science plane. Therefore the camouflage paraphernalia appears, more or less visible, to your own astonishment. Now, so strong is this tendency for vitality to change from one apparent form to another, that what you have here in your flying object is something that is actually, as you view it, not of your plane or of [whatever] plane of its origin ... The atoms and molecules that structurally compose the UFO, and which are themselves formed by vitality, are more or less aligned according to the pattern of its own territory. Now as the craft enters your plane a distortion occurs. Its actual structure is caught in a dilemma of form ... between transforming itself completely into earth's particular camouflage pattern, and retaining its original pattern. The earthly viewer attempts to correlate what he sees with what he supposedly knows or imagines possible in the universe.
quotes.translation: [许多]飞碟现象源自[此类]层面，该层面在科技上远比当前地球先进。然而这仍非心灵科学层面。因此，伪装装置会以或隐或现的方式显现，令你们惊异。生命力从一种显形转化为另一种的倾向如此强烈，以至于你们所见的飞行物，实际上既非来自你们的层面，也非其本源层面……构成UFO结构的原子与分子（本身由生命力形成）会按其自身领域的模式排列。当飞行器进入你们层面时，便会产生扭曲。其实际结构陷入形态困境——在完全转化为地球特定伪装模式与保留原始模式之间挣扎。地球观察者试图将所见之物与自身认知或想象中宇宙可能存在的现象相关联。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 713)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The flying saucer appearances come from a plane that is much more advanced in technological sciences than earth at this time. However this is still not a mental science plane. Therefore the camouflage paraphernalia appears, more or less visible, to your own astonishment. Now, so strong is this tendency for vitality to change from one apparent form to another, that what you have here in your flying saucers is something that is actually, as you view it, not of your plane nor of the plane of its origin. What happens is this. When the flying saucer as you prefer to call it starts out toward its destination, the atoms and molecules that structurally compose it, and which are themselves formed by vitality, are more or less aligned according to the pattern inflicted upon it in its own territory. Now as this enters your plane a distortion occurs. The actual structure of the craft is caught in a dilemma of form. It is caught between transforming itself completely into earth's particular camouflage pattern, and retaining its original pattern. The earthly viewer attempts to correlate what he sees with what he supposedly knows or imagines possible, in the little he knows of the universe.
quotes.translation: 飞碟现象源自一个科技远胜当前地球的层面。然而这仍非心灵科学层面。因此，伪装装置会以或隐或现的方式显现，令你们惊异。生命力从一种显形转化为另一种的倾向如此强烈，以至于你们所称的飞碟，实际上既非来自你们的层面，也非其本源层面。实际情况是：当飞碟（按你们惯用的称呼）启程前往目的地时，构成其结构的原子与分子（本身由生命力形成）会按其自身领域施加的模式排列。当它进入你们层面时，便产生扭曲。飞行器的实际结构陷入形态困境——在完全转化为地球特定伪装模式与保留原始模式之间挣扎。地球观察者试图将所见之物与自身有限认知中可能存在的宇宙现象相关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The intellect is extremely important in the manipulation of camouflage patterns once they are created. You have made your world, and your intellect should help you deal with what you have created. It has other vital functions which I shall enumerate at a later date. However, I cannot say this too often: You are more than your conscious mind, much more, and the self which you do not admit happens to be the portion of yourself which not only insures your own survival in the physical universe which it has made, but which is also the connective portion of yourself with inner reality. Which is, when all is said and done, the only basic reality; and which also continually enables you to create these camouflage patterns, and which contains knowledge and intuitions and memories which you need in a most desperate manner if you are ever to understand yourselves, and if the race of mankind is ever to evolve to its fullest.
quotes.translation: 智力在伪装模式被创造后的操控过程中极为重要。你们创造了你们的世界，而你们的智力应协助你们处理自己所造之物。它还有其他重要功能，我将在日后详述。然而，我再三强调：你们远不止是你们的意识心智，远不止于此，而你们所不承认的那个自我，恰恰是你们自身的一部分——它不仅确保你们在它所创造的物质宇宙中的生存，也是你们与内在实相相连的部分。归根结底，内在实相是唯一的基本实相；它持续不断地使你们能够创造这些伪装模式，并蕴含着你们若想理解自身、人类种族若想充分进化所亟需的知识、直觉与记忆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Beneath this, pure and simple, undistorted, there for the searching, absolutely free for the asking, is the knowledge inherent in the inner self pertaining to the inner universe as a whole, its laws and principles, its composition. Here you will find, undistorted, uncamouflaged, the innate knowledge of the creation of the camouflage universe, the mechanics involved, much of the material that I have given you, the method and ways by which the inner self as a basic inhabitant of the inner universe, existing in the climate of psychological reality, helps create the various planes of existence, constructs outer senses to project and perceive the various apparent realities or camouflages, how the inner self reincarnates on the various planes. Here you will find your answers as to how the inner self transforms energy for his own purposes, changes his form, adopts other apparent realities, and all this free for the investigation.
quotes.translation: 在此之下，纯粹、简单、未经扭曲、唾手可得、完全免费求索的，是内在自我所固有的、关乎整个内在宇宙的知识——其法则与原理、其构成。在此，你们将找到未经扭曲、毫无伪装的、关于伪装宇宙创造过程的内在知识，包括其中涉及的机制、我曾给予你们的许多资料、内在自我作为内在宇宙的基本居民、存在于心理实相的气候中，如何协助创造各种存在层面、构建外在感官以投射和感知各种表面实相或伪装、以及内在自我如何在各个层面上转世。在此，你们将找到答案：内在自我如何为自身目的转化能量、改变形态、采用其他表面实相——这一切都可供自由探究。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are here also thrusts in all directions, with certain identifying pulsations that underlie all, and that have their origins within the inner self. As the vitality of the universe forms, of itself, the boundaries of the various fields of activity, and as vitality itself takes on the coloration of the various fields and forms the camouflage patterns within them, so also vitality, in the form of emotions that the camouflage patterns of the personality, even while this vitality forms both emotions and personality for every individual, every consciousness, may be thought of as a separate field of activity; and all the data relating to fields of activity may be seen to apply to any consciousness as well.
quotes.translation: 此处亦有向各个方向的推进，带有某些贯穿一切、源自内在自我的特定识别脉动。正如宇宙的生命力自身形成各种活动领域的边界，正如生命力自身染上各个领域的色彩并在其中形成伪装模式，同样地，生命力以情绪的形式——即使这生命力为每个个体、每个意识同时形成情绪与人格——也可被视为一个独立的活动领域；而所有与活动领域相关的资料，同样适用于任何意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Again, your elements, those that you know and those that you will discover, and the elements you will create, are only camouflages of the basic stuff or vitality, which you will not discover with your outer senses. Your scientists will discover that their tools are no longer adequate. Because man has such a sense of curiosity the scientists on your plane will be forced finally to use their own inner senses. Otherwise they will be dealing with camouflage only, and find themselves in a blind alley. Not because their eyes are closed, but because they are not using the right set of eyes. You will come no closer to knowledge of the fifth dimension until you use the inner senses as tools of perception.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，你们所知或将要发现的元素，以及你们将创造的元素，都只是基本物质或生命力的伪装，你们无法用外在感官发现它们。你们的科学家会发现他们的工具已不再适用。由于人类具有强烈的好奇心，你们层面的科学家最终将被迫使用自己的内在感官。否则他们只会处理伪装，并发现自己陷入死胡同。这不是因为他们闭上了眼睛，而是因为他们没有使用正确的眼睛。除非你们将内在感官作为感知工具，否则永远无法接近第五次元的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The whole self as you know has its existence in uncamouflaged energy, and is therefore capable of the assimilation of knowledge in so far as it can, if it chooses, be basically unaffiliated to any one camouflage dimension or perspective. In actual practice this takes a supreme development, but even for general purposes the inner self retains a freedom from camouflage perspectives, and is aware in varying degrees of other perspectives, and of its existence outside of them.
quotes.translation: 你们所认知的整体自我存在于未经伪装的能量中，因此能够吸收知识——只要它选择如此，它本质上可以不受任何单一伪装维度或视角的束缚。在实际操作中这需要极高的修为，但即使对一般目的而言，内在自我仍保有脱离伪装视角的自由，并在不同程度上觉察到其他视角，以及自身在这些视角之外的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When it is understood that space and time are both camouflages, and that your cause and effect theory is a result of a continuity theory that no longer makes sense, then your scientists will recognize the impossibility of trying to decipher basic reality with camouflage instruments, and vehicles, that of themselves produce distortive theories, and only serve to probe further into a camouflage pattern.
quotes.translation: 当人们理解空间与时间都是伪装，而你们的因果理论源于一种不再成立的连续性理论时，你们的科学家就会认识到：试图用伪装仪器和工具来破解基本现实是不可能的——这些工具本身就会产生扭曲的理论，只会进一步深入伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Part of the subconscious for example deals with camouflage, but the deeper portions are in direct contact with the basic vitality of the universe. When you or Ruburt wonder if this material comes from the subconscious, you often take it for granted that the subconscious is personal, exclusively dealing with matters of your egos' personal past. You are sometimes willing to concede that perhaps an element of racial memory might enter in. Racial memory is of course a conglomeration of camouflage data. The subconscious also contains the undistorted material of the mind, which is un-camouflaged, and which operates between planes, knowing no boundaries.
quotes.translation: 例如，潜意识的一部分处理伪装，但更深层的部分则与宇宙的基本生命力直接接触。当你或鲁柏怀疑这些资料是否来自潜意识时，你们常理所当然地认为潜意识是个人的，只处理你们自我个人过去的事务。你们有时愿意承认或许有种族记忆的元素介入。种族记忆当然是伪装数据的集合体。潜意识也包含心智未经扭曲的资料，这些资料未经伪装，在层面之间运作，不受界限限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Even as Ruburt looks out the window, seemingly through empty space at the street, the so-called space simply is not empty, though through the specialized camouflage senses it may appear to be empty. Your outer senses merely equip you to perceive your own camouflage, but to others your camouflage may in some cases appear as empty space, while what is empty to you is filled with activity for them.
quotes.translation: 即使鲁柏望向窗外，看似透过空无一物的空间看到街道，所谓的空间其实并非空无一物，尽管通过专门的伪装感官它可能显得空无一物。你们的外在感官仅使你们能感知自己的伪装，但对其他存在而言，你们的伪装在某些情况下可能显得像空无一物的空间，而你们视为空无的空间，对他们来说却充满了活动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I cannot simply appear in your midst, or make myself known in my own form. I have explained camouflage patterns to you, I have explained the way the vitality or stuff of the universe changes from plane to plane. Then why do you find it strange that at your end I must to some degree change essence, and find a point of entry, which happens to be Ruburt's subconscious? It has enough camouflage pattern to enable me to make contact, but not so much as to distort me out of all recognition. I have described the effects of entry into your plane of the so-called flying saucers, and my entry into your plane is something of the same.
quotes.translation: 我不能简单地出现在你们中间，或以我自己的形态示人。我已经向你们解释过伪装模式，也解释过宇宙的生命力或物质如何从一层面变化到另一层面。那么，你们为何觉得奇怪，在你们的层面，我必须在某种程度上改变本质，并找到一个切入点，而这恰好是鲁柏的潜意识？它有足够的伪装模式让我建立联系，但又不至于扭曲我至无法辨认。我曾描述过所谓的飞碟进入你们层面的效果，而我进入你们层面的过程也与此类似。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: On your particular kind of culturally organized grouping the camouflage is necessarily strong, and the outside senses correspondingly vivid. This of course is bound to block some inner data. At the same time it is the inner vitality which creates the camouflage to begin with. Joseph was right when he spoke of entities creating stages upon which to act out their problems. The point of course being that once the play begins the actors are so completely immersed in their roles that they forget that they themselves wrote the play, constructed the sets, or are even acting. The reason for this is rather apparent.
quotes.translation: 在你们这种特定文化组织形态中，伪装必然十分强烈，外在感官也相应鲜明。这自然会屏蔽某些内在信息。但与此同时，正是内在生命力创造了伪装。约瑟说得对，他说实体创造舞台来演绎自身的问题。关键在于，一旦戏剧开场，演员们完全沉浸于角色之中，竟忘记是自己编写了剧本、搭建了布景，甚至忘记了自己正在表演。原因相当明显。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The camouflage patterns of course do belong to the inner world also, since the camouflages themselves are formed from the vitality stuff of the universe by mental enzymes, which have a chemical reaction on your plane. The reaction of course being a distortion. That is, any camouflage pattern at all is bound to be a distortion, in a sense, of vitality forced into a particular form.
quotes.translation: 伪装模式当然也属于内在世界，因为伪装本身是由宇宙的生命力材料通过精神酶素形成的，这些酶素在你们层面会产生化学反应。这种反应当然是一种扭曲。也就是说，任何伪装模式在某种意义上都必然是对生命力被迫进入特定形态的扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This involves efficient, complete use of the outer senses in their perception of camouflage reality, and of joyful, effective behavior and manipulation within that field of camouflage in which you spend a certain level of your existence. When you operate within it you should indeed experience it completely, in as many phases as possible, and be it to a much greater degree than is usually achieved, the conscious mind using itself then in experience, and thus knowing itself. And then the switch to use of the inner senses. The great contrast then refreshes the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这涉及对外在感官的高效完整运用来感知伪装实相，以及在你们存在某个层面所栖身的伪装领域中进行愉悦有效的行动与操控。当你们在其中运作时，确实应当尽可能多层面地完整体验它，让意识心在体验中运用自身从而认识自身，达到远超寻常的深度。随后再切换至内在感官的运用。这种强烈对比将使整个自我焕然一新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Any materializations by the way, returning to an offshoot of our earlier discussion, are at best the sort of thing involved as with Ruburts deep voice. That is, they represent rather than are, on your terms. They cannot exist in duration upon your level for any long periods. They are an attempt to reproduce a camouflage pattern or to approximate such a pattern. As such they make quite an effect upon your level, but they are always reassembles and never are they the actual reappearance of the exact camouflage as it may once have existed upon your level.
quotes.translation: 附带一提，回到我们先前讨论的衍生话题，任何物质化现象充其量就像鲁柏的深沉嗓音那样。也就是说，它们在你的认知中代表某种存在而非真实存在。它们无法在你的层面持续存在太久。它们试图复制或近似某种伪装模式。虽然能在你的层面产生显著效果，但这些始终是重组产物，绝非曾经存在于你层面的精确伪装的真实再现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In prehistoric times mankind evolved the ego and self-consciousness to help him deal with the camouflage patterns that he had created. This is no contradiction, and will be explained later. He did the job so well that even when he had things under control he was not satisfied. He developed at a lopsided level. He used himself as a tool to dissect himself. The inside senses led him to a reality he could not manipulate as easily as he could a camouflage world, and he feared what he thought of as a loss of mastery.
quotes.translation: 在史前时期，人类进化出自我意识与自我认知来应对自己创造的伪装模式。这并非矛盾之说，后续将详细解释。人类做得太过成功，即便掌控局面后仍不满足。他们以失衡的方式发展，将自己当作解剖自身的工具。内在感官引领他们触及无法像操控伪装世界般轻易掌控的实相，于是他们恐惧所谓"失去掌控权"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In your terms, the rate at which you discover the facets and realities of the spacious present becomes your camouflage time. On your plane there must be physical manipulation. This gives you also the illusion of past and future, and to you it appears that the present is a fleeting, almost ashen illusion in itself, beyond any true remembrance and beyond the reach of any but nostalgic recall. This is also caused by your camouflage system in which physical materializations appear and grow, mature and disappear.
quotes.translation: 以你们的说法，探索广袤当下各个面向与实相的速度，便构成了你们的伪装时间。在你们的层面必须进行物质性操作，这同时制造了过去与未来的幻象。对你们而言，当下本身就像转瞬即逝的灰烬幻影，既无法被真实铭记，也仅能通过怀旧追忆触及。这种错觉同样源于你们的伪装系统——在这个系统中，物质化现象不断显现、成长、成熟直至消亡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Different outer senses are necessary at different levels and on various planes to interpret the different camouflage patterns. These outer senses are developed to cope with these particular camouflage patterns which the personality will meet in its various environments. The inner senses always operate regardless of the particular environment in which the personality is presently involved. The inner senses provide the whole personality with balance, and enable it to keep in contact with its vitality source.
quotes.translation: 不同层次与不同层面上需要不同的外在感官来解读不同的伪装模式。这些外在感官是为了应对人格在其各种环境中将遇到的特定伪装模式而发展出来的。内在感官则始终运作，不受人格当前所处特定环境的影响。内在感官为整个人格提供平衡，并使其能够与自身的活力源头保持联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This value or quality is simply beyond the boundary of your camouflage （underline） existence. There is no camouflage yardstick by which it can be measured, and yet as Ruburt will certainly testify it is a startling, valid and memorable experience. I will bring this to the foreground now more often in our sessions, as it is most valuable. Like an ordinary psychological experience it cannot be measured on your terms, and yet makes a noticeable impression upon the individual involved.
quotes.translation: 这个价值或特质完全超越了你伪装（下划线）存在的边界。没有任何伪装尺度可以衡量它，然而正如鲁柏必定会证实的那样，它是一种令人震惊、真实且难忘的体验。我将在我们的课程中更频繁地将其带到前台，因为它极为珍贵。如同普通的心理体验，它无法用你的标准来衡量，却会对相关个体留下显著的印象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A system may say that within its limitations there is room for still further transformation of energy into still more various camouflage forms. It may be generally said, but only generally, that the most advantageous system is that system which has great diversity of camouflage patterns, in that energy, always individualized, is then given expression within the system in different materializations, which then allow for further individualization to the benefit of the whole system.
quotes.translation: 一个系统可能会说，在其限制范围内仍有空间将能量进一步转化为更多样化的伪装形式。可以大致（但仅能大致）地说，最有利的系统是拥有高度多样化伪装模式的系统，因为能量始终是个体化的，在这样的系统中通过不同的物质化形式得以表达，进而允许进一步的个体化，从而惠及整个系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: None of the above mentioned are aware of your plane. There is among others another classification beside culture establishment existences, and these keep camouflage patterns at a minimum and are not as similar as cultural establishment existences are to your own plane. These materialize camouflage pattern only at certain times to express and deal with inner conflicts not yet worked out. I did not intend to get into this so deeply yet, as it may be confusing to say the least.
quotes.translation: 上述存在皆不知晓你们的层面。除了文化建构存在之外，还有另一种分类，它们将伪装模式维持在最低限度，且与你们层面的文化建构存在并不相似。这些存在只在特定时刻物质化伪装模式，以表达和处理尚未解决的内在冲突。我本无意如此深入探讨此议题，因为至少可以说这可能会令人困惑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Tuesday does not exist to the inner ego. Your outer ego is now experiencing the camouflage time year of 1964. This simply does not exist to the inner ego, therefore the inner ego is effortlessly aware of any choices or decisions that you may make freely in say 1970. It does not affect your choice. It has absolutely nothing to do with whatever future choice you may make. It is aware of such future choices simply because the camouflage future does not exist for it.
quotes.translation: 星期二对内在自我而言并不存在。你们的外在自我此刻正在经历伪装时间——公元1964年。这对内在自我而言根本不存在，因此内在自我能毫不费力地知晓你们在1970年可能自由做出的任何选择或决定。这并不影响你的选择，也与你未来可能做出的任何选择毫无关联。它之所以知晓这些未来选择，仅仅是因为伪装未来对它而言并不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The grouping of inner senses with which we are now concerned deal with the disentanglement of one set of camouflage patterns and the taking up of another set. The groupings of inner senses most dependent upon the use of psychological time are those which involve a nearly complete disentanglement from camouflage pattern, without taking on other patterns, and these are perhaps the most important because they come closer to the direct experience of unveiled reality.
quotes.translation: 我们此刻关注的内在感官集群，涉及脱离一套伪装模式并接纳另一套伪装模式的过程。最依赖心理时间运用的内在感官集群，是那些近乎完全脱离伪装模式、且不接纳其他模式的部分——这些或许最为重要，因为它们更接近未加掩饰的实相的直接体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As you know, camouflage elements are formed from the vital energy, which itself forms of itself all dimensions and all realities. It exists within all camouflage, since the camouflage itself is merely the form that is adopted. The inhabitants of any dimension, or whatever makeup, are still whole-self constructions.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，伪装元素是由生命力形成的，这生命力本身形成了所有维度与所有实相。它存在于所有伪装之中，因为伪装本身只是所采用的形式。任何维度或任何构成的居民，仍然是全我结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We have, I believe, used the analogy of air, comparing it to the vitality of the universe in one of our previous sessions. As air is dispelled from the lungs in various forms and used and reused without any loss of power, strength or quantity, so is the vitality of which we speak used in different manners. So does it enter as one thing many times, and so does it emerge as something different many times; and so does it change shape and content, and so does it show many faces and yet never disappears. And as air seems invisible so does this vitality seem invisible, and yet like air this vitality gives shape to every object that you see, and so does it form every camouflage. Without it all camouflage would vanish. And so the ability to use this vitality well is as necessary to life as is the necessity to use air for breathing.
quotes.translation: 我相信，在之前的一节课中，我们曾用空气作比喻，将其比作宇宙的生命力。正如空气以各种形式从肺部排出，并被反复使用而没有任何力量、强度或数量的损失，我们所说的生命力也以不同方式被使用。它多次以同一事物进入，又多次以不同事物出现；它改变形状与内容，展现众多面貌却从未消失。正如空气看似无形，这生命力也看似无形，然而像空气一样，这生命力赋予你所见的每个物体以形状，并形成所有伪装。没有它，所有伪装都会消失。因此，善用这生命力的能力对生命而言，如同呼吸空气一样必要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The entity should therefore not be thought of as completed. The electric universe, of which you know so little, is a reality, and yet it is also a symbol of another reality. For behind even this electrical universe there is a reality which cannot be explored in terms of speech; for all consciousness, while having an electric reality, has a reality beyond even this. It is the vitality of the universe, and all universes, which causes the electrical reality, and the vitality of the universe, composing everything that is, cannot be touched. It is touch, but touch not as it is conceived of in your terms. This vitality is the most immediate and intimate aspect that composes the camouflage appearance within all fields. And yet it is by far more than the camouflage.
quotes.translation: 因此，不应将存有视为已完成之物。你们所知甚少的电性宇宙是一个实相，但它也是另一个实相的象征。因为即使在这电性宇宙背后，还有一个无法用言语探索的实相；所有意识虽具有电性实相，却拥有超越此层面的实相。正是宇宙及所有宇宙的生命力造成了电性实相，而构成万物的宇宙生命力是无法被触摸的。它是触摸本身，但并非你们概念中的触摸。这生命力是构成所有场域中伪装外观最直接、最亲密的面向。然而，它远不止是伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have visited several. It is difficult to put this into words. These planes of which I have spoken have some basic similarity with your own, though the camouflage patterns have no similarity. That is, the similarity is one of organization, a variety of historical continuity, a strong and involved ego mechanism, a complicated camouflage code system; without, however, the dual inner and outer sense of alienation with which your race has become involved.
quotes.translation: 我曾探访过数个这类层面。此事难以言传。我所提及的这些层面与你们的世界存在某种基本相似性，尽管伪装模式毫无雷同。换言之，其相似性在于组织架构、某种历史延续性、强大且错综复杂的自我机制、以及一套繁复的伪装编码系统；然而，你们种族所陷入的那种内在与外在双重疏离感，在这些层面中并不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Concentrating upon your own camouflage universe, you are able to distinguish only the distortive pattern, and from this pattern you deduce your ideas of cause and effect, past, present and future, and ideas of an expanding universe that bloats. Consciousness takes up no space nor is it enclosed by time, as you know time. The camouflage patterns that seem to enclose consciousness are temporary, for short term only, and for limited but necessary purpose.
quotes.translation: 当你们专注于自身的伪装宇宙时，只能辨识出扭曲的形态，并据此推导出因果、过去、现在与未来的概念，以及一个不断膨胀的宇宙观。意识不占据任何空间，也不被你们所认知的时间所局限。那些看似包裹意识的伪装形态仅是暂时的，仅为短期且必要的目标服务。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Surely you see where that leads us. If you will forgive me, my dear Joseph, you are full of air. I won't say hot air. But you look like a man. The man form, the physical form, is a camouflage that you see. You do not see the air of which you are composed when you look into a mirror. You are also composed of much water, yet you do not see a wet spongy mess when you look into the glass, at least I hope not. You see the camouflage or the physical form.
quotes.translation: 你必然明白这导向何处。恕我直言，亲爱的约瑟，你体内充满空气——我并非指空话。但你呈现为人类形态。人类形态、物质形态，正是你所见的伪装。当你照镜子时，看不见构成自身的空气。你体内同样富含水分，但至少我希望你照镜子时不会看见一团湿漉漉的海绵。你看见的是伪装，即物质形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As temperatures in various depths of ocean change, and as even the color of the water and of the flora and fauna change, so too in our value climate there are quality changes, and senses equipped to project and perceive the changes. There are distortions because of the limitations of the outer senses, but the inner senses do not distort. The inner senses inhabit directly the atmosphere of our value climate; and they see through the ever varying camouflage patterns, and the flux and flow of apparent change. In our sessions to some small degree you plunge into this ocean of value climate, and to the extent that you are able to divest yourselves of the clothes of camouflage, to that extent can you truly be aware of this climate.
quotes.translation: 正如海洋不同深度的温度变化，甚至海水颜色与动植物色彩也随之改变，在我们的价值气候中同样存在品质变化，感官被赋予投射与感知这些变化的能力。由于外在感官的局限会产生扭曲，但内在感官不会扭曲。内在感官直接栖居于我们价值气候的氛围中；它们能看穿不断变化的伪装模式，以及表象变化的流动与变迁。在我们的课程中，你们在某种程度上潜入这价值气候的海洋，而你们能卸下伪装外衣的程度，正是你们真正感知这种气候的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As temperatures in various depths of ocean change, and as even the color of the water and of the flora and fauna change, so too in our value climate there are quality changes, and senses equipped to project and perceive the changes. There are distortions because of the limitations of the outer senses, but the inner senses1 do not distort. The inner senses inhabit directly the atmosphere of our value climate; they see through the ever-varying camouflage (physical) patterns, and the flux and flow of apparent change. To some small degree in our sessions you plunge into this ocean of value climate, and to the extent that you are able to divest yourselves of the clothes of camouflage, you can be truly aware of this climate.
quotes.translation: 正如海洋不同深度的温度变化，甚至海水颜色与动植物色彩也随之改变，在我们的价值气候中同样存在品质变化，感官被赋予投射与感知这些变化的能力。由于外在感官的局限会产生扭曲，但内在感官不会扭曲。内在感官直接栖居于我们价值气候的氛围中；它们能看穿不断变化的伪装（物质）模式，以及表象变化的流动与变迁。在我们的课程中，你们在某种程度上潜入这价值气候的海洋，而你们能卸下伪装外衣的程度，正是你们真正感知这种气候的程度。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The physical body is a camouflage pattern operating in a larger camouflage pattern. But the physical body and all camouflage patterns, looked at in another manner, are also transformers of the vital inner stuff of the universe, where this vitality is then enabled to operate under new and various conditions.
quotes.translation: 物质身体是在更大伪装模式中运作的伪装模式。但从另一种角度来看，物质身体与所有伪装模式，也是宇宙内在生命能量的转换器，使这种生命力得以在新的多样条件下运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is no end to our environment. In your terms there would be no lack of space or time in which to operate. Now this would put tremendous pressure on any consciousness without proper background and development. We do not have one simple, cozy universe in which to hide. We are still alert to other quite alien systems of reality that flash on the very outskirts of consciousness as we know it. There are far more various kinds of consciousness than there are physical forms, each with its own patterns of perception, dwelling within its own camouflage system. Yet all of these have inner knowledge of the reality that exists within all camouflage and that composes any reality, by whatever name it is called.
quotes.translation: 我们的环境永无止境。以你们的时间观念来看，操作所需的时空绝不会匮乏。然而，若缺乏适当的背景与发展，这将对任何意识造成巨大压力。我们并非藏身于某个简单舒适的宇宙中。我们所知的意识边缘仍闪烁着其他全然陌生的实相系统，其数量远超物质形态，每种意识都有独特的感知模式，栖居于自身的伪装系统之中。然而，所有这些意识都内在知晓存在于所有伪装之内的实相——无论以何种名目称呼，这实相构成了所有现实。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This sixth sense is too important to skim over, and yet I wanted to mention it this evening because it fits in with our discussion. Without this sixth sense, and without its constant use by the inner self-conscious ego, you could not even construct the physical camouflage universe of your own plane. This sense, again, is used constantly beneath the outer egos awareness, and forms the basis for camouflage constructions on every plane.
quotes.translation: 这第六感至关重要，不容轻描淡写，但我今晚提及它，是因为它与我们的讨论相契合。若没有这第六感，没有内在自我意识自我对其持续运用，你们甚至无法构建自身层面的物质伪装宇宙。再次强调，此感在外在自我意识之下持续运作，构成每个层面伪装建构的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The portrait that you sent to the gallery is evocative. It continues to grow. It is not completely at the mercy of a completed camouflage. The whole self is never completely constructed on your plane. At best it finds expression now and then. A camouflage plane, merely by being what it is, makes it impossible for the whole self to find expression. There is almost hypnotic focus of energy for a particular time for a particular reason.
quotes.translation: 你送去画廊的那幅肖像画充满感染力。它仍在持续生长，并未完全受制于完成的伪装。完整的自我从未在你们层面完全建构，至多只能偶尔获得表达。伪装层面因其本质，使完整自我无法全然展现——能量近乎催眠般聚焦于特定时空，为特定目的而存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have spoken of mental enclosures. Theoretically there is no such thing as a closed system. However for all practical purposes a closed mental system is one which allows the least amount of camouflage data to come through. It is not closed entirely but nevertheless it could be said to approximate in psychic terms the enclosure within which your so-called mediums work; that is, with a minimum of camouflage communication at hand.
quotes.translation: 我曾提及心智封闭系统。理论上不存在完全封闭的系统，但就实际运作而言，封闭的心智系统是指允许最少伪装资料通过的系统。它并非完全封闭，但就心灵层面而言，可近似于你们所谓灵媒运作的封闭场域——即手边仅存最低限度的伪装沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The part that translates inner data sifts it down through the subconscious, which is a barrier and also a threshold to the present personality as it operates on the camouflage plane. I have mentioned many times how vitality changes as it approaches and forms various planes. I have said that the topmost part of the subconscious contains personal memories. That beneath these are racial memories and so forth. Things are simply not layered in the way I speak of them. But continuing with the necessary analogy, on the other side of （or beneath to you） the racial memories, you no longer exist within your plane, and look out upon another with the face of this other self-conscious part of you. This part receives inner data, is in contact with the entity, to some greater degree than you are in contact with your dreams, and actually directs all the important functions that you think are either automatically controlled, or unconsciously controlled.
quotes.translation: 负责转译内在资料的部分会将其筛滤至潜意识层，这层屏障同时也是当前人格在伪装层面运作的门槛。我曾多次提及生命力在接近并形成各层面时如何转化。我曾说过潜意识最上层包含个人记忆，其下则是种族记忆等。事物并非如我所述这般层层堆叠，但延续必要的类比：在种族记忆的另一侧（或对你们而言的底层），你们已不再存在于自身层面，而是以另一个自我意识部分的面容向外凝视另一层面。此部分接收内在资料、与存有保持联系——其联系程度甚至超过你们与自身梦境的接触——并实际主导所有你们认为由自动控制或无意识控制的重要功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Outer physical time is a complete camouflage, unnecessary basically on your plane; but you have made it seem necessary because of your refusal to admit the inner self as part of your whole personality, and therefore you have not been able to utilize psychological time to its fullest advantage on your plane. Psychological time as I have said is a natural pathway, part of an inner sense, that was meant as an easy access from the inner to the outer world and back again. You do not use it as such.
quotes.translation: 外在物理时间是完全的伪装，在你们层面本非必要；但因你们拒绝承认内在自己是完整人格的一部分，致使无法在自身层面充分运用心理时间，从而使其看似不可或缺。如我所言，心理时间是天然通道，属于内在感官的一部分，本应作为内在世界与外在世界之间的便捷通路。你们却未能善加利用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Instead I would like to give you some more material dealing with mental enclosures. These are in some respects a different sort of camouflage, a self-formed, artificial and only partial enclosure, a beneficial psychic device within which the inner self momentarily and temporarily gathers and holds and collects as much psychic energy about it as it is capable of receiving, utilizing, and also withstanding. The mental enclosure in most cases is self-limiting then, since it represents a setting up of barriers on all sides but one. But it is limiting only for the ultimate purpose of intense concentration of energy, resulting in a burst or expansion of this energy that has been transformed and pressurized, so to speak, into new patterns.
quotes.translation: 相反，我想提供更多关于心灵围场的资料。这些围场在某些方面是一种不同形式的伪装，一种自我形成、人为且仅部分封闭的围场，是一种有益的心灵装置，内在自我在其中暂时聚集、持有并收集它能接收、利用并承受的尽可能多的心灵能量。在大多数情况下，心灵围场是自我限制的，因为它代表在除一面之外的所有方向设置障碍。但它之所以具有限制性，仅是为了最终实现能量的高度集中，从而引发这种经过转化和加压的能量爆发或扩展，可以说，形成新的模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The brain is a camouflage pattern. It takes up space. It exists in time. The mind takes up no space, it does not have its basic existence in time. The reality of the inner universe does not take up space, nor does it have its basic existence in time. Your camouflage universe, on the other hand, takes up space and has an existence in time, but it is not the real and basic universe, any more than the brain is the mind.
quotes.translation: 大脑是一种伪装模式。它占据空间。它存在于时间中。心灵不占据空间，它的基本存在不在时间中。内在宇宙的现实不占据空间，它的基本存在也不在时间中。另一方面，你的伪装宇宙占据空间并在时间中存在，但它并非真实和基本的宇宙，正如大脑并非心灵一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We shall look in from the other side, for there is a looking-in also from the other side. I have mentioned before that beneath camouflage the fifth dimension is truly transparent. I have said that dream universe data has its effect upon your universe, as your universe has its effect upon the dream universe. It is also true that the dream universe is at least as familiar with your own universe as you are familiar with it; and as you tune in on it, so to speak, and while you are necessary for its survival, creating it, so does the dream universe tune in on you. So is your survival dependent upon its survival, and so does it create you as a by-product, if you are looking at your universe from the other side.
quotes.translation: 我们将从另一面向内看，因为从另一面也有向内看的过程。我之前提到过，在伪装之下，第五维度是真正透明的。我曾说过，梦宇宙的数据对你的宇宙产生影响，正如你的宇宙对梦宇宙产生影响一样。同样真实的是，梦宇宙对你的宇宙的熟悉程度，至少与你对它熟悉程度相当；并且，当你调频进入它时，可以说，在你对其生存不可或缺并创造它的同时，梦宇宙也在调频进入你。因此，你的生存依赖于它的生存，并且，如果你从另一面看待你的宇宙，它也会将你作为副产品创造出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is only the inner senses which will give you any evidence at all of the basic nature of life itself. Since very often the vitality or stuff of the universe seems as innocuous as air might seem to you, then look for what you do not see. Explore places that appear empty, for they are full. Look between events. What you see clearly with your outer senses is camouflage. I am not suggesting that you take everything on faith, nothing of the sort. I am saying that what seems vacant lacks camouflage, and therefore if this is explored it will yield evidence. I hope I have not carried you too far too fast.
quotes.translation: 只有内在感官才能为你提供生命本身基本性质的任何证据。由于宇宙的生命力或素材常常像空气对你而言那样无害，那么就去寻找你看不见的东西。探索看似空无的地方，因为它们充满生机。在事件之间寻找。你用外在感官清晰看到的是伪装。我并非建议你仅凭信仰接受一切，绝非如此。我是说看似空无的事物缺乏伪装，因此如果加以探索，就会提供证据。希望我没有让你走得太快太远。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your physical time of seasons and tides, and night and day, is to me one of your most delightful camouflages, and if Ruburt will excuse my clumsy attempt at being poetical, I will say that physical time is like a delightful flowing gown that clothes psychological time with many different colors and materials and designs. It is a most faithful reproduction of psychological time, and one of your truest camouflages.
quotes.translation: 你们物理时间中的季节、潮汐、昼夜，在我看来是你们最迷人的伪装之一。如果鲁柏能原谅我笨拙的诗歌尝试，我会说物理时间就像一件飘逸的长袍，用许多不同的颜色、材质和图案来装点心理时间。它是对心理时间最忠实的再现，也是你们最真实的伪装之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The patterns evolve according to certain laws. They merely reflect the ideas behind them, and these ideas you must realize originate from different sources. They originate in the subconscious, it is true, but before this an idea quality is received by the inner senses. Sometimes this idea quality is received as intuition, where it sparks into the conscious mind. But the conscious ego is the primary manipulator of camouflage patterns and the obvious mover. The actual material from which camouflage patterns are formed is the vitality which exists and which is unconsciously used by your personalities.
quotes.translation: 这些模式根据特定法则演变。它们仅仅反映背后的理念，而你必须明白这些理念源自不同来源。它们确实源自潜意识，但在此之前，一种理念特质被内在感官接收。有时这种理念特质作为直觉被接收，从而激发进入意识心智。但意识自我是伪装模式的主要操控者和显性的推动者。构成伪装模式的实际素材是存在的生命力，由你们的人格无意识地使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We have gone into this before, and I have no doubt that we will on endless occasions. And if I succeed in convincing you of my reality as a personality, I will have done extremely well ... Ruburt's subconscious has enough camouflage pattern to enable me to make contact, but not so much as to distort me out of all recognition. I am not his subconscious, though I speak through it. It is the atmosphere through which I can come to you, as the air is the atmosphere through which the bird flies. A certain reassembly of myself is necessary when I enter your plane, and this is done partially by myself, and by the combined subconscious efforts of you, Joseph, and Ruburt. Will this satisfy you for now?
quotes.translation: 我们之前探讨过这个问题，而且我确信我们还会无数次地回到这个话题。如果我能成功让你相信我是一个真实的人格，那便是极大的成就……鲁柏的潜意识拥有足够的伪装模式，使我得以建立联系，但又不至于扭曲到面目全非。我并非他的潜意识，尽管我通过它说话。它是我得以抵达你们所在之处的媒介，正如空气是鸟儿飞翔的媒介。当我进入你们的层面时，必须进行某种程度的自我重组——这既由我部分完成，也借助你约瑟和鲁柏的潜意识共同协作。这样解释你暂时满意了吗？
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You think of space as an emptiness to be filled because on your plane you fill what you call space with camouflage patterns. And I repeat: instead true space, fifth dimensional space, is the vitality and stuff of all existence itself, vital and alive, from which all other existences are woven through means which I have outlined so far in a rather sketchy fashion. Even on your plane quality, which represents a kind of expansion, does not necessarily imply an expansion of space. The universe expands continually in a qualitative manner that has nothing to do with space as it is usually envisioned. And the expansion is more vivid and valid than I can possibly explain to you at this time.
quotes.translation: 你们将空间视为需要填充的空虚，因为在你们的层面上，你们用伪装模式填满所谓的空间。我重申：真正的空间——第五维空间——实为一切存在本身的活力与本质，它生机勃勃、充满活力，所有其他存在皆通过我迄今粗略勾勒的方式从中编织而成。即使在你们的层面上，代表某种扩展的"品质"也未必意味着空间的扩展。宇宙以与通常认知的空间概念无关的质性方式持续扩展，这种扩展的生动与真实程度远超我此刻所能向你解释的范畴。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As you create physical matter constantly without knowing that you do so, so also you create constantly a dream universe, and this dream universe is as individual as your environment in the physical world. There is also a chemical reaction here, for without dreaming the physical organism could not exist. With your outer senses, you perceive but the camouflage physical reality which the physical senses are equipped to perceive. In the dream universe you are however free, and familiar, with both space and time in a manner which is denied you in the waking state. Where indeed are your dream locations? Where in space is the street upon which you walk in a dream?
quotes.translation: 正如你们在不知不觉中持续创造物质实相，你们同样持续创造着一个梦境宇宙——这个梦境宇宙与你们在物质世界中的环境一样具有独特性。这里也存在化学反应：没有梦境，物质有机体便无法存续。你们用外在感官只能感知到物质感官被设计去感知的伪装物质实相。然而在梦境宇宙中，你们却得以自由地、熟悉地运用空间与时间——这种运用方式在清醒状态下是被禁止的。你们梦境中的地点究竟在何处？你们在梦中行走的街道，又存在于空间的哪个位置？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Only when a certain level of confidence is reached can the outer ego afford to become familiar with these inner workings, at least on your plane. Otherwise you would falter. As a rule, even though the whole self is capable of organizing the data from all of the inner senses, the subconscious can rarely receive such communications full blast; and the outer ego, concerned as it is with camouflage pattern, and really born to deal with camouflage pattern, simply could not stand the shock of realization that a complete set of inner senses would bring.
quotes.translation: 只有当达到某种程度的自信时，外在自我才能在你的层面上熟悉这些内在运作。否则你会步履蹒跚。通常来说，即使整体自体能够组织所有内在感官的数据，潜意识也很少能全盘接收这类讯息；而专注于伪装模式、且生来就是为了处理伪装模式的外在自我，根本无法承受完整内在感官所带来的认知冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Their time measurements, based on camouflage to begin with, are almost riotously inadequate and bound to give distortive data, since the universe simply cannot be measured in these terms. The universe was not created at any particular time, but neither is it expanding into nowhere like an inflated balloon that grows forever larger, at least not along the lines now being considered. The expansion is an illusion, based among other things upon inadequate time measurements, upon the limited cause and effect theories; and yet in some manners the universe could be said to be expanding, but with entirely different connotations than are usually used.
quotes.translation: 它们基于伪装的时间测量方式几乎荒谬地不充分，必然会产生扭曲的数据，因为宇宙根本无法用这些术语来衡量。宇宙并非在某个特定时间被创造，但也不是像永远膨胀的气球那样向虚无扩张——至少不是目前所考虑的那种方式。这种膨胀是一种幻觉，其基础包括不充分的时间测量、有限的因果理论；然而在某些方面，宇宙确实可以被说成在膨胀，但具有完全不同于通常使用的含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Hypnotism will be necessary, however, only for a time, and only to induce the light trance state. In the light trance state, the inner self is free from the camouflage nature of your plane, and the truly humorous aspect is this: Only by freeing yourself from your own camouflage universe can you see it clearly, understand it for what it is, and actually learn to use it for mankind's best advantage.
quotes.translation: 然而，催眠术只会在特定时期内必要，且仅用于诱导轻度出神状态。在轻度出神状态中，内在自体摆脱了你所在层面的伪装本质，而真正幽默之处在于：只有将自己从自身的伪装宇宙中解放出来，你才能清晰地看见它，理解它的本质，并真正学会如何为人类的最大利益运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: "Instruments calculated to measure the vibrations with which scientists are familiar will be designed and redesigned. All sorts finally of seemingly impossible phenomena will be discovered with these instruments, until the scientists realize that something is desperately wrong. The instruments will be planned to catch certain camouflages, and since they will be expertly thought out they will perform their function. I do not want to get too involved. However, by certain means the instruments themselves will transform data from terms that you cannot understand into terms that you can understand. Scientists do this all the time."
quotes.translation: 旨在测量科学家所熟悉的振动的仪器将被设计再设计。最终，这些仪器将发现各种看似不可能的现象，直到科学家意识到某些地方出了严重问题。这些仪器将被设计用来捕捉特定的伪装，由于它们经过精心构思，将能发挥其功能。我不想过于深入探讨。然而，通过某些方式，仪器本身会将你无法理解的数据转化为你能理解的形式。科学家们一直在这样做。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 1. In Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality, I wrote in Note 7 for Session 681 that atoms are "processes" rather than things. The classical conception of the typical atom as being composed of a neat nucleus of indivisible protons and neutrons circled by electrons is largely passé, although for convenience's sake we may still describe the atom that way. (In those terms, the one exception is the hydrogen atom, which evidently consists of but one proton and one electron cloud, or "smear.") For the simple purposes of this note, then, I'm leaving out considerations involving quantum mechanics, which concept repudiates the idea of "particles" to begin with. (And surely that notion involves more than a little of the psychic, or "irrational." What a heretical thought from the scientific viewpoint!) But each atom of whatever element is an amazingly complicated, finely balanced assemblage of forces and particles woven together in exquisite detail--one of the more basic examples of the unending and stupendous creativity, order, and design of nature, or consciousness, or All That Is.

quotes.text: However, when it is enabled to let go its preoccupation with the camouflage universe, it can receive and be aware of data received by the inner senses. Such data does not have to be retained on a subconscious level. The conscious personality can be trained to receive, interpret and retain such knowledge. Otherwise such knowledge would be relatively without value in your camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 然而，当它能够放下对伪装宇宙的执念时，它就能接收并意识到内感官所接收的数据。这类数据不必保留在潜意识层面。有意识的人格可以被训练来接收、解读并保留这类知识。否则，这类知识在你的伪装宇宙中将相对毫无价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This fact is responsible to a large degree for your death shock, and for the more powerful birth shock, when the new personality awakes to the prisonlike clutch of rigid camouflage pattern. Other levels have different and sometimes severe problems of a different type. One of the basic purposes of existence on your plane is to enable the personality to focus powerfully and to form basic vitality into creative pattern. Sometimes the lesson is learned too well. However, it is extremely difficult for personalities to learn to organize vitality well enough to give it form, and therefore some troubles are to be expected.
quotes.translation: 这一事实在很大程度上导致了你的死亡冲击，以及更强烈的出生冲击——当新的人格觉醒于僵化伪装模式的牢笼般束缚时。其他层面存在不同且有时严重的其他类型问题。你所在层面的基本目的之一，是让人格能够强力聚焦，并将基本生命力塑造成创造性的模式。有时这个教训被学得太好了。然而，人格要学习如何充分组织生命力以赋予其形态是极其困难的，因此一些麻烦是可以预料的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned earlier the peculiar problems of your scientists as with tools and instruments they attempt to reduce reality to their terms. Any instruments made on your plane are like your outer senses, constructed to perceive camouflage patterns. The instruments of the scientists, and the outer senses themselves, are camouflage patterns and cannot, and never will, dissect themselves.
quotes.translation: 我曾提过你们科学家面临的特殊问题，他们试图用工具和仪器将实相简化成自己的术语。你们物质层面制造的任何仪器都像你们的外在感官一样，被构建成感知伪装模式。科学家的仪器和外在感官本身都是伪装模式，它们无法也永远不会剖析自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I do want to add one note. The camouflage effect surrounding a plane, and apparent in your universe, can be measured. But it must be recognized first as a camouflage distortion, and then translations of the camouflage measurements must be made.
quotes.translation: 我确实想补充一点。围绕一个层面并显现在你们宇宙中的伪装效应是可以测量的。但必须先认识到这是一种伪装扭曲，然后必须对伪装测量结果进行转译。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A certain distortion must be expected, in the same manner that a distortion occurs in the form of your flying saucers. The painting in other words achieves a certain freedom from camouflage, while it cannot escape it, and actually hovers between planes in a way that no thoroughly camouflaged object could do. That is, something that exists completely in your plane cannot be evocative in the manner that a painting or, and this is for Ruburt, a poem can be.
quotes.translation: 必须预期到某种扭曲，就像你们飞碟形状中出现的扭曲一样。换句话说，绘画在无法完全摆脱伪装的情况下获得了某种自由，实际上它以某种方式悬浮于不同层面之间，这是任何完全伪装的物体都无法做到的。也就是说，完全存在于你们层面的事物，无法像绘画或——这对鲁柏而言——诗歌那样具有唤起性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The physical brain as you know it is but the camouflage mechanism belonging to the physically oriented self. In some cases, severe damage is done to the brain, and yet rationality continues. In these cases the mind behind the brain operates as always. When the individual is convinced that his activities are completely dependent upon the physical brain, then he is incapacitated almost completely by any injury to it. The brain itself contains knowledge that comes through the inner senses, and this knowledge would simply not be available to it, if it were dependent upon physical data completely.
quotes.translation: 你们所知的物质大脑不过是属于物质导向自我的伪装机制。在某些情况下，大脑受到严重损伤，但理性依然持续运作。在这些案例中，大脑背后的心智始终如常运作。当个体深信自己的活动完全依赖物质大脑时，任何对大脑的伤害都会使他几乎完全丧失能力。大脑本身包含通过内在感官获得的知识，如果它完全依赖物质资料，这些知识根本不可能为它所获取。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This is why psychological time seems to flow so easily when physical time is pursued and watched by a quiet "I". The one leads to the other and the camouflage is loose enough to let the inner form shine through. A proper use of psychological time will not only lead you into the inner world, but will also prevent you from being rushed in the physical world. Within it, that is within the framework of psychological time, you will discover a quiet and cool peacefulness. I tell you both this for your benefit, because both of you will gain much in the utilization of these added benefits.
quotes.translation: 这就是为什么当物质时间被安静的"我"所追随和观察时，心理时间似乎如此顺畅地流动。一个引导向另一个，伪装足够松散，让内在形态得以显现。恰当运用心理时间不仅会引导你进入内在世界，也会防止你在物质世界中仓促行事。在心理时间框架内，你会发现一种宁静而清凉的平和。我告诉你们这些是为了你们的好处，因为你们两人在运用这些额外益处时都会获益良多。
