quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is much too difficult to go into deeply now. It might help you to reread the little material on mental enclosures. Expansion you see is a word that implies movement or enlargement in space, and space itself in the way the word is usually used, is a camouflage. Space, I have said, is the fifth dimension, but you have seen that this true space has little in common with the space that you usually think of. That is, fifth dimensional space is not an emptiness to be filled, being itself alive and vibrant, and changing its outer nature according to the plane which is composed of it.
quotes.translation: 现在深入探讨这个主题太过困难。重读关于心灵围场的少量资料或许对你有帮助。你看，"扩展"这个词暗示着空间中的运动或扩大，而空间本身——就这个词通常的用法而言——是一种伪装。我曾说过，空间是第五维度，但你们已经看到，这个真实空间与你们通常所想的空间几乎没有共同之处。也就是说，第五维空间并非等待被填充的空无，它本身是鲜活而充满活力的，并根据构成它的层面改变其外在性质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The traveler must leave his own camouflage paraphernalia completely behind however, or he will go nowhere. It is possible, theoretically, to travel to any system in this manner, and bypass others you see. Such a traveler would not age physically. His physical body would be in a suspended state. The traveling consciousness would lose all physical conception of time however. A very few individuals have traveled in this manner to any extensive degree. Most of the knowledge gained escapes the physical organism however, for the experiences could not be translated by the physical brain.
quotes.translation: 旅者必须完全抛下自身的伪装装备，否则将寸步难行。理论上，可以这种方式前往任何系统，并绕过你所见的其他系统。这样的旅者不会经历生理衰老，其肉体将处于悬浮状态。然而，旅行的意识会完全丧失对时间的一切物理概念。极少数人曾以这种方式进行过相当程度的旅行，但大部分获得的知识无法被肉体组织接收，因为物理大脑无法转译这些体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: How many people? Very few would take this amount of their camouflage time to deal with it. It takes a peculiar set of abilities and interests for such work to be even partially successful or even accepted by the personalities involved; and for many personalities it would be difficult to maintain discipline and balance, while allowing for the necessary freedom that is necessarily involved. That is, this is a controlled experiment, with both of you allowing yourselves certain freedoms of control in certain instances and not in others. This is no easy trick. Is that what you meant?
quotes.translation: 有多少人能做到？极少有人愿意花费如此大量的伪装时间来应对此事。要使这类工作获得部分成功，甚至被相关人格所接纳，需要一套特殊的能力与兴趣组合；对许多人而言，在维持必要自由度的同时保持纪律与平衡极为困难——这本质上是一场受控实验，你们双方在某些情境下允许自己拥有特定控制自由，在其他情境则不然。这绝非易事。你问的是这个吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Action and counteraction, operating through chemical enzymes, enable purposeful activity in which no motion is haphazard. The smallest imaginable particle gives evidence of that basic unity of energy adopting form, materializing the camouflage pattern necessary for efficient manipulation within your universe, that is composed of diverse but interwoven fields of apparent, semi-apparent, or unapparent activities and correlations. That is, many valid actions within your own universe do not, as you know, have solidity, and yet appear within and operate through the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 通过化学酶运作的作用与反作用，使有目的的活动得以实现，其中没有任何运动是随机的。最微小的可想象粒子都证明了能量采取形态的基本统一性，物质化出在你们宇宙中有效运作所必需的伪装模式——这个宇宙由多样却相互交织的场域构成，包含显性、半显性或隐性的活动与关联。也就是说，你们宇宙中许多有效的活动，如你所知，并不具备实体性，却仍显现在物理宇宙中并通过其运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You would not be able to perceive a sufficient amount of data to make any deductions. This is not to say that such planes or fields of actuality cannot in some manner be perceived, but they will escape physical perception or exploration. In dreams, when the self is somewhat free from camouflage, perhaps it is possible for the self then to travel spontaneously into such fields of actuality; but since they are as bizarre to the self as is the dream world itself, then there is no way, usually, for the sleeper to distinguish between the universe of dreams or other actualities.
quotes.translation: 你无法感知到足够的数据来做出任何推论。这并不是说这些实相层面或领域在某种程度上无法被感知，但它们会避开物质感知或探索。在梦境中，当自我稍微摆脱伪装时，或许自我能够自发地进入这样的实相领域；但由于这些领域对自我而言就像梦境世界本身一样奇异，通常沉睡者无法区分梦境宇宙或其他实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You do experience time, but not time as it is bound by your camouflage patterns. As I have mentioned you can in a dream or daydream or through conscious use of psychological time experience many hours in a few clock minutes. This experience comes very close to the third inner sense. If you will remember again our imaginary experience through the inner senses as we looked down at the street, you will remember that I spoke of sensing not only the present essence of the living consciousness within a certain scope, but I also mentioned sensing their past and futures.
quotes.translation: 你确实体验时间，但并非受你伪装模式束缚的时间。如我所提，你可以在梦境、白日梦或有意识地使用心理时间时，在几分钟的时钟时间内体验许多小时。这种体验非常接近第三内在感官。如果你还记得我们通过内在感官向下看街道的想象体验，你会记得我曾提到不仅感知到某个范围内活生生的意识的当下本质，还感知到它们的过去和未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is one thing to recognize that your particular camouflage patterns are part of reality and another to realize that there is a reality that is independent of your camouflage patterns. One of my purposes is to enable you not only to recognize but experience this independent reality, and again the use of psychological time in a correct manner will be an invaluable aid.
quotes.translation: 认识到你特定的伪装模式是实相的一部分是一回事，而意识到存在独立于你伪装模式的实相则是另一回事。我的目的之一不仅是让你认识到这种独立实相，还要体验它，而再次以正确方式使用心理时间将是无可估量的助力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Since any materialization is in effect a mediation between what we may call an ideal which is, by nature, of itself not materialized, and a practical working perceivable symbol of the ideal, each materialization must be composed of some camouflage elements. Within the physical field these perceivable symbols are composed of matter, which is a conglomeration of atoms and molecules. Each individual, creating, say, his version of any given chair, uses entirely different atoms and molecules in his subconscious construction of it.
quotes.translation: 由于任何物质化本质上都是介于我们所谓的"理念"（其本质自身尚未物质化）与理念的实用可感符号之间的媒介，因此每个物质化必然由某些伪装元素构成。在物理场域中，这些可感符号由物质构成，而物质是原子与分子的聚合体。每个个体在潜意识中建构任何既定椅子时，都会使用完全不同的原子与分子来创造其专属版本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now, I project a portion of my reality as I dictate this book to an undifferentiated level between systems that is relatively clear of camouflage. It is an inactive area, comparatively speaking. If you were thinking in terms of physical reality, then this area could be likened to one immediately above the atmosphere of your earth. However I am speaking of psychological and psychic atmospheres, and this area is sufficiently distant from Ruburt's physically oriented self so that the communications can be relatively understood.
quotes.translation: 此刻，当我口述此书时，正将自身实相的一部分投射至系统间一个相对无伪装的未分化层面。就相对性而言，这是个不活跃的区域。若以物质实相思维考量，此区域可比拟为地球大气层正上方的空间。然而我指的是心理与灵性氛围，此区域与鲁柏的肉体导向自我保持足够距离，使通讯得以相对清晰地被理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Nor do such projections involve necessarily journeys through space as you know it. There are systems, extremely vivid in intensity, that have no existence in physical reality. It is now thought, I believe, that time and space are basically one, but they are both a part of something else. They are merely the camouflage patterns by which you perceive reality. Space, as you experience it in the dream state, comes much closer to reality.
quotes.translation: 此类投射未必涉及你们所认知的空间穿越。存在某些强度极为鲜明的系统，在物质实相中毫无存有。据我所知，现今学界认为时间与空间本质一体，但两者皆属于某种更宏大存在的一部分。它们不过是你们感知实相所用的伪装模式。你们在梦境状态中体验到的空间，反而更接近实相本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I have also explained how energy is transformed, and changes, adapting itself to the particular camouflage pattern of any given plane. Now in these tests you will reach the inner self. The results will be, then, valid in physical terms. The emotions are the outer extensions of the inner senses, and it is therefore through the intuitions and traveling, the traveling of the pathways of the emotions, that you will come in contact with the inner self, and therefore be able to carry back this information in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 我也解释过能量如何转化与改变，以适应任何特定层面的伪装模式。在这些测试中，你们将触及内在自体。因此，其结果在物质层面也将是有效的。情绪是内在感官的外向延伸，因此，正是通过直觉与情绪路径的旅行，你们才能与内在自体接触，从而以同样的方式带回这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is not in any manner inevitable or a law of the universe. Far from it. For some reason mankind as a species on your plane has become much more attached to its camouflage patterns than most other kinds of consciousness. And with some important exceptions, all types of consciousness do have their peculiar camouflage patterns to which they more or less adhere.
quotes.translation: 这绝非宇宙的必然法则或定律。恰恰相反。由于某些原因，人类作为你们层面的物种，比大多数其他意识类型更执着于其伪装模式。除了一些重要例外，所有类型的意识确实都有其或多或少固守的独特伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This material is leading up to some future discussions, and the nature of action will be most important. Action is as valid whether the act is conscious and voluntary, or whether it occurs within a dream or within a thought. It is as much a reality either way. Again, it is not an outside force. It arises from within the inner vitality of which all camouflage is composed. To some degree it is a result of inner vitality's attempt to completely express itself in materializations, and its inability to do so.
quotes.translation: 这些材料将引导至未来的讨论，而行动的本质将至关重要。无论行动是有意识且自愿的，还是发生在梦境或思想中，行动同样有效。无论哪种方式，它都是同等真实的现实。再次强调，它并非外在力量。它源于构成所有伪装的内在生命力。在某种程度上，它是内在生命力试图在物质化中完全表达自身却未能如愿的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Using the senses developed on a particular plane to perceive its characteristic camouflage patterns, it is almost impossible to see beyond these boundary effects. The inner senses are inherently equipped to do this, but for many reasons they do not. The appearance of an expanding universe is also caused therefore by this distortive boundary effect, resulting from the interaction of which I have just spoken. In some cases the distortive effect could be likened to the reflection of a solid tree in water.
quotes.translation: 运用在特定层面上发展出的感官来感知其特有的伪装模式，几乎不可能看穿这些边界效应。内在感官天生具备这种能力，但基于诸多原因它们并未运用。因此，宇宙膨胀的表象也是由这种扭曲的边界效应所造成，源于我刚才提及的交互作用。在某些情况下，这种扭曲效应可类比为水中映现的实体树木倒影。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: That is, you will achieve the counterpart of sight, sound, smell, touch, embellished by inner counterparts of width and existence. You have trouble now with the duration of your inner visions because you are trying to transpose them according to physical camouflage time, and this is going about it in the wrong way to begin with. As I mentioned earlier in the last session, you have at your command even now an inroad so to speak, and a relatively accessible one, in what is termed psychological time.
quotes.translation: 也就是说，你将获得视觉、听觉、嗅觉、触觉的对应物，并辅以宽度与存在感的内在对应。你目前难以把握内在视野的持续时长，是因为你试图根据物质伪装时间来转译它们，而这种方法从一开始就是错误的。正如上次课程中我提到的，即便此刻你也掌握着所谓"心理时间"这个突破口——可以说，这是一个相对易于进入的通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In a very simple example, consider that you yourself use your own energy to create your dream world. In this way also you create your so-called real camouflage world, the only difference being that the dream world images do not have duration in physical time although they have duration in psychological time. And believe it or not, actually your individuality has much more freedom in the creation of your dream world, and this is the reason why the dream world does not appear consistent to others.
quotes.translation: 举个简单的例子：你正运用自身能量创造梦境世界。同样地，你也创造了所谓的真实伪装世界，唯一的区别在于：梦境世界的意象虽在心理时间中具有持续性，却在物质时间中缺乏延续性。信不信由你，实际上你的个体性在创造梦境世界时拥有更多自由，这正是梦境世界无法与他人保持一致的缘由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inhabitants see only the camouflage. They then accept this particular camouflage as a definite rule of nature, never realizing that just beyond their eyesight and just beyond all their outer senses, this familiar tamed animal of a law changes appearance completely. So complete in fact is the transformation as to be almost in some cases unrecognizable.
quotes.translation: 居民们只看到伪装。他们于是接受这种特定的伪装为自然界的明确法则，从未意识到就在他们的视线之外、在所有外在感官之外，这条被驯服的熟悉法则会完全改变面貌。事实上，这种转变如此彻底，以至于在某些情况下几乎无法辨认。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your outside egos are constructed to enable you to deal with the camouflage world. It is necessary. It necessarily also narrows your concentration and your understanding. During your existence you are focused, you are stuck to, you are placed and centered in, your physical universe by the outside ego. It manages your manipulation of camouflage material.
quotes.translation: 你们的外在自我被构建为让你们能够处理伪装世界。这是必要的。它同时也必然地缩小了你们的专注力和理解力。在你们的存在期间，你们被聚焦、被固定、被安置并集中于你们的物质宇宙中，这是由外在自我完成的。它管理着你们对伪装材料的操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Action （you may if you prefer use the term vitality; I prefer the term action） action continually attempts to express itself in endless formations. It therefore materializes itself in various forms. I term these forms camouflage. Within your system the camouflage is physical matter. It is impossible for action to completely express itself in any medium.
quotes.translation: 行动（如果你们愿意，可以使用活力这个术语；我更喜欢行动这个术语）行动持续试图在无尽的形态中表达自己。因此它将自己物质化为各种形式。我将这些形式称为伪装。在你们的系统内，伪装就是物质。行动不可能在任何媒介中完全表达自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Space travel, in your terms, will develop in a seemingly extravagant and startling fashion, only to be dumped as such when your scientists discover that space as you know it is a distortion, and that journeying from one so-called galaxy to another is done by divesting the physical body from camouflage. The vehicle of so-called space travel is mental and psychic mobility, in terms of psychic transformation of energy, enabling spontaneous and instantaneous mobility through the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 以你们的话来说，太空旅行将以看似铺张且惊人的方式发展，然而当你们的科学家发现你们所认知的太空其实是一种扭曲，并且从一个所谓的星系到另一个星系的旅程是通过卸除伪装肉身来完成的，这种旅行方式就会被抛弃。所谓太空旅行的载具是心智与心灵的机动性，就能量的心灵转化而言，它能通过广袤的当下实现自发且瞬时的移动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The facts are simply that you yourselves form these camouflage patterns, and I repeat this simple statement: You form the camouflage world of appearances with the same part of you that breathes. You do not admit the breather as really being a part of yourselves, nor do you admit the creator of the camouflaged physical world as being part of yourselves.
quotes.translation: 事实很简单：你们自己形成了这些伪装模式。我重复这个简单的陈述：你们用与呼吸相同的那个自己部分，形成了这个表象的伪装世界。你们不承认那个呼吸者真的是你们自己的一部分，也不承认那个创造伪装物质世界的存在是你们自己的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The action is only apparent or visible in a particular field when it adopts the camouflage coloration of the field in question. Basically the action has not changed. The camouflage distortion is like the effect that water reflections have upon the image that falls across the water.
quotes.translation: 只有当行动采用所在场域的伪装色时，它才在该特定场域中显现或可见。本质上，行动并未改变。伪装的扭曲就像水面倒影对投射其上的影像所产生的效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You cannot see a handful of air though your hands may be full of it. You know its effects, you breathe it constantly, but consciously you do not realize what you are doing. You do not know how air tastes unless you really think hard about it. It is fuel to your physical body and the idea of it comes very close to this fuel of the inner senses, which is not a camouflage effect and which is our vitality unsolidified, or the little wires which make up our imaginary universe. In other words these little wires move along constantly like little individual railway cars carrying fuel, and also are composed of the very fuel themselves.
quotes.translation: 你无法看见满手的空气，尽管你的双手可能充满它。你知道它的效应，你不断呼吸它，但有意识地你并未意识到自己在做什么。除非你真的认真思考，否则你不知道空气的味道如何。它是你肉体的燃料，而它的概念非常接近内我感官的这种燃料，这不是一种伪装效应，而是我们未固化的活力，或是构成我们想象宇宙的那些小电线。换句话说，这些小电线像运载燃料的小型独立火车车厢一样不断移动，并且它们本身也由这种燃料构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This concept is one of the easiest to explore, since as I have said your clock time is one of the most artificial of your camouflages. The time concept in dreams may seem far different than your conception of time in the waking state, when you have your eyes on a clock and are concerned with getting to some destination by, say, 12:15. But it is not so different from time in the waking state when you are sitting alone in a room with your thoughts, and with no particular need to get anywhere.
quotes.translation: 这个概念是最容易探索的概念之一，因为正如我所说，你的钟表时间是你最人为的伪装之一。梦中的时间概念可能看起来与你清醒状态下的时间概念大不相同——当你盯着时钟，关心着比如说在12:15之前到达某个目的地时。但当你独自坐在房间里沉思，没有特别需要去任何地方时，它与清醒状态下的时间并没有那么不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Granted, your camouflage is in itself an effect. If you look at the observable physical world in this life, you can, it is true, learn something about the basic rules of the universe, if you take into consideration camouflage distortion. There is so much to be said here, and you have so much to learn that sometimes I have to admit that I'm appalled.
quotes.translation: 诚然，你的伪装本身是一种效应。如果你在这一生中观察可感知的物质世界，确实，如果你考虑到伪装的扭曲，你可以学到一些关于宇宙基本规则的道理。这里要说的太多，而你要学的也太多，以至于有时我不得不承认我感到震惊。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner senses in other words are the means, the mental enzymes are the tools, and the vitality is the actual material that forms the universe as a whole, the apparent divisions within it, the apparent boundaries of the various divisions, and the diverse materials within each division. Again, the different materials within each division are only camouflages formed by the inner senses upon the material itself.
quotes.translation: 换言之，内在感官是手段，心灵酵素是工具，而活力则是构成整个宇宙的实际材料——包括其中看似分立的区域、各区域间的明显界限，以及每个区域内的不同物质。再次强调，每个区域内的不同物质只是内在感官在材料本身之上形成的伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Once more, the undifferentiated layers or areas are composed of the vitality that forms the camouflage of all systems. It is not therefore--that is, such an area is not, therefore--a separate thing in itself, but simply a portion of vitality that contains no camouflage, and is therefore again unrecognizable to those within any given system.
quotes.translation: 再重复一次，那些未分化的层次或区域，是由构成所有系统伪装的活力所组成。因此，这样的区域本身并非独立存在之物，而只是不含任何伪装的一部分活力，因而对任何特定系统内的存在而言，它再次变得无法辨认。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You are dealing with camouflage. Your outside senses are perceptron of camouflage, and your table which you rest your arms upon is not solid. This does not mean that your arms will suddenly fall to the floor. It does mean that even your science is discovering the existence of the inside world, which it will be unable to deny much longer.
quotes.translation: 你们正在与伪装打交道。你们的外在感官是伪装的感知器，而你们搁放手臂的桌子并非固体。这并不意味着你们的手臂会突然掉到地板上。它确实意味着，即便是你们的科学，也正在发现内在世界的存在，而它很快将无法再否认这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: That is the analogy. In actuality the mind is but a which looks out for the personality on the camouflage plane. Your guardian angel legends and such refer to this part of the entity, which is the mind and which is attached to the present personality during this particular existence. The mind helps to keep the personality from going too far astray. I use the term personality to include the whole person. I use it to express the entirety manifested in physical form, in one life.
quotes.translation: 这就是类比。实际上，心灵不过是人格在伪装层面上的一个瞭望者。你们关于守护天使的传说之类，指的就是实体的这一部分——即心灵，它在这次特定存在中与当前人格相连。心灵帮助防止人格过于偏离正轨。我用"人格"一词来涵盖整个人，用它来表达在某一世中以物质形态显现的整体性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: And again, dreams are themselves never completed, but continue on whether or not your perception of them continues. For dreams also are gestalts. When you look into the mirror you see the camouflage image. You do not see the ego, though you know that it exists. But the idea, ego, is in itself an arbitrary unit chosen for particular reasons. It is not a thing. You have drawn lines, imaginary lines, and made an arbitrary boundary. This does not mean that the ego does not exist.
quotes.translation: 再者，梦本身从未完成，无论你对它们的感知是否持续，它们仍在继续。因为梦也是完形。当你照镜子时，你看到的是伪装影像。你虽知自我存在，却看不见它。但"自我"这个观念本身，是为特定原因而选择的一个任意单位。它并非一个实物。你画出了线条——想象的线条，并划定了任意边界。这并不意味着自我不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This reality and those attributes will appear within various systems of actuality in keeping with the camouflage data of any given system. The inner experience with the multidimensional God can come in two main areas. One is through the realization that this prime moving force is within everything that you can perceive with your senses. The other method is to realize that this primary motive force has a reality independent of its connection with the world of appearances.
quotes.translation: 这个实相及其属性，会依照任何特定系统的伪装数据，出现在不同的实相系统中。与多维神的内在体验可来自两个主要领域。其一是认识到这原动力存在于你感官所能感知的一切之中。其二是认识到这原动力具有独立于其与表象世界联系的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Some controls are still present. These struggle desperately to distort the past data, clothing it in all sorts of idea camouflages and fantasy. In this case insanity is actually a protective mechanism, in that the personality will face almost complete disorientation rather than confront truths in its past that bring up problems it cannot solve. At the same time such a personality will not let go, either, and will not change course. The dilemma is therefore a dire crisis.
quotes.translation: 某些控制机制仍然存在。它们拼命扭曲过往数据，用各种观念伪装与幻想加以粉饰。在此情况下，精神错乱实为一种保护机制——人格宁可面对近乎彻底的迷失，也不愿直面过往中那些引发无解难题的真相。然而这类人格既不肯放手，也不愿改变方向，因此陷入致命的危机。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They have the knowledge to a very large degree, but they have fallen short. It is one thing to realize that all physical matter is camouflage, and they know this. But this camouflage can be most disastrous if it is not manipulated correctly. You are in no position to ignore it. You are in a position to understand it and to use it.
quotes.translation: 他们虽已掌握相当程度的知识，却终究未能达标。认识到所有物质都是伪装是一回事——他们确实明白这点。但若未能正确驾驭，这种伪装可能造成最灾难性的后果。你绝无立场忽视它，而应处于理解并运用它的位置。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is really a building up of idea into a whole pattern that can be perceived by the camouflage senses. Any reality therefore will be variously perceived, and the nature of the reality will necessarily be distorted in the very attempt to perceive it. Here again we have our creative tension, whereby a new reality is formed as a result of the distortion itself. Within your system colors may be perceived as sound. Their connections with human moods is only too apparent.
quotes.translation: 这实则是将观念逐步构建成能被伪装感官感知的完整模式。因此任何实相都会被不同方式感知，而实相的本质在感知过程中必然遭到扭曲。我们在此再次看到创造性的张力——正是扭曲本身催生了新的实相。在你们的系统中，颜色可能被感知为声音，它们与人类情绪的关联显而易见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your plane is a training place in the use of manipulation of energy. Your plane seems to deal with cause and effect, but this is in itself a necessary camouflage. In actuality there is no cause and effect as you think of it. There is only spontaneity. For a particular interval you must be taught as if there were cause and effect, so that the result of spontaneity would not end up as chaos. This statement may seem contradictory but later you will see that it is not.
quotes.translation: 你们的物质层面是学习运用能量操控的训练场。这个层面看似遵循因果法则，但这本身就是必要的伪装。实际上并不存在你们所认知的因果关系，只有自发性。在特定阶段，你们必须被教导仿佛存在因果关系，这样自发性的结果才不会沦为混乱。这个说法看似矛盾，但日后你们会明白并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The physical body is formed about its electrical counterpart, yet they are both intertwined in completely different dimensions. All the knowledge gained by the present ego is retained in electrical form, as is all experience so retained. The camouflage material will be discarded as a physical gestalt, as far as the individual is concerned. The matter of the physical body will simply be used in other gestalts, in the manner that I have explained in earlier sessions.
quotes.translation: 物质身体围绕其电性对应体形成，但两者却交织在完全不同的维度中。当前自我获得的所有知识都以电性形式保存，所有经验亦如此储存。就个体而言，伪装材料将作为物质完形被舍弃。身体物质只会以我之前课程解释过的方式，用于其他完形结构中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Basically, the psyche is a manifestation of pure energy in a particular form. It is very difficult to consider its experience outside of the framework familiar to you. You demand a certain preciseness of definition and terminology. That vocabulary automatically structures the information, of course. The psyche is a conglomeration of energy gestalts. To understand that, you must realize that pure energy has such transforming pattern-forming propensities that it always appears as its manifestations. It becomes its "camouflages."
quotes.translation: 从根本上说，心灵是纯粹能量以特定形式的显化。要考量其经验，很难脱离你们熟悉的框架。你们要求定义和术语的精确性，这种词汇自然会结构化信息。心灵是能量完形的聚合体。要理解这点，必须认识到纯粹能量具有如此强大的转化性模式形成倾向，以至于它总是以自身显化的形态呈现——它变成了自己的"伪装"。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your scientists can count their elements. While they are on the wrong track they will discover more and more elements. That is, they will create more and discover more until they are ready to go out of their minds. Because what will happen is, they will always create camouflages of the real thing. And while they create instruments to deal with smaller and smaller particular particles, they will actually see smaller and smaller particles, seemingly without end.
quotes.translation: 你们的科学家能数出他们的元素。当他们走在错误的方向上时，他们会发现越来越多的元素。也就是说，他们会创造更多、发现更多，直到他们快要发疯为止。因为会发生的是，他们总会创造出真实事物的伪装。当他们制造仪器来处理越来越小的特定粒子时，他们实际上会看到越来越小的粒子，似乎永无止境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: (From the 33rd session for March 9, 1964:) I do not bring about the trance state in the manner of which you [Joseph] are speaking. Ruburt switches on another channel, through which my essence can enter more readily. This certainly does involve a looking inward on his part, but it is not self-hypnosis in usual terms -- merely a focusing upon an objective inner stimulus ... Any such signs (as the powerful, deeper Seth voice) involve camouflage patterns, and do not actually represent direct experience. This is not my voice, for example. It is a representation or approximation of my voice for your edification. Furthermore, in your terms I do not have a voice. But it is a valid representation, and if I say so myself -- that's a pun -- the voice is much like the one I would use....
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年3月9日第33节课：）我并非以你所[约瑟夫]说的那种方式引发出神状态。鲁柏切换了另一个频道，我的本质可以通过这个频道更容易地进入。这当然涉及他向内看，但并非通常意义上的自我催眠——只是聚焦于一个客观的内在刺激……任何这样的迹象（如那有力、更深的赛斯声音）都涉及伪装模式，实际上并不代表直接体验。例如，这不是我的声音。它是为了你们的教化而对我声音的一种再现或近似。此外，按你们的说法，我并没有声音。但这是一个有效的再现，而且恕我直言——这是个双关语——这声音很像我会用的那种……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: As far as these drugs are concerned there are a few points I would like to make. One of your purposes as I have said is to learn to organize energy units and to focus your own energy along those lines. That is, you are the energy that you use. The self-consciousness is not to be blotted out but taken along. It is so to speak to walk side by side with the inner self. The use of these drugs sweeps the personality off its feet. Often the personality does receive a rewarding glimpse of the inner reality, but more often the ego is merely sent tumbling through frightening images of chaotic phantom realities formed by a suddenly-released subconscious, and with no guide. The experience is often vivid and long remembered, but so unorganized and undisciplined that no inner order is arrived at, no other organization glimpsed, and the ordinary but necessary camouflage footing suddenly dispensed with.
quotes.translation: 至于这些药物，我想提出几点。如我所说，你们的目的之一是学习组织能量单元，并沿着那些路线聚焦你们自己的能量。也就是说，你们就是你们所使用的能量。自我意识不应被抹去，而应被带着走。可以说，它要与内在自我并肩同行。使用这些药物会让整个人格失去平衡。人格有时确实会瞥见内在实相而有所收获，但更常见的是，自我只是被抛入由突然释放的潜意识所形成的混乱幻象实相的可怕意象中，且没有向导。这种体验往往生动且长久难忘，但如此无组织、无纪律，以至于无法达到任何内在秩序，无法瞥见任何其他组织，而平常但必要的伪装立足点则突然被舍弃了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is always an imbalance here that may of itself be termed action. It cannot be perceived as any one thing, for it is a relationship and a dimension. It can be perceived most directly, and with less distortion, in the dream state. For here it is allowed the freedom of itself. Here you have also the inner vitality that has not been materialized within the realm of material camouflage. You have the tendency of this inner vitality to materialize, and its inability to completely do so. In the dream state the tendency for this vitality to materialize meets with little resistance. Action within actions result, without physical space. Distances appear and are experienced as such. Action is much less limited. Rather, action itself is not less limited, but you can experience action with less limitations, for the ego which erects such limitations lets down its guard.
quotes.translation: 这里总存在一种不平衡，这种不平衡本身可被称为行动。它无法被感知为任何单一事物，因为它是一种关系与维度。在梦境状态中，它能以最少扭曲被最直接地感知。因为在此处，它得以享有自身的自由。在此你也能接触到尚未在物质伪装领域内物质化的内在活力。你看到这种内在活力趋向物质化，却又无法完全实现。在梦境状态中，这种活力物质化的倾向几乎遇不到阻力。行动中的行动得以发生，无需物理空间。距离显现并被如实体验。行动受到的局限大大减少。更准确地说，并非行动本身减少了局限，而是你得以在更少限制下体验行动——因为构建这些限制的自我放下了戒备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Also, I do not agree that it is beneficial for the personality to become used to dispensing so entirely with his camouflage pattern. It is necessary that the camouflage pattern be recognized for what it is, but on your plane it still must be manipulated, and the efficiency of manipulation is extremely necessary.
quotes.translation: 此外，我不同意让个性习惯于完全摒弃其伪装模式是有益的。必须认清伪装模式的本质，但在你的层面上，它仍必须被操控，而操控的效率至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: No concepts can be boxed in. The reality with which we are concerned flows through your camouflage world, forms the material with which you build your constructions, permeates every atom and molecule in your world, but does not originate in your world. That is, it does not originate in your camouflage world.
quotes.translation: 没有任何概念能被框限。我们所关注的实相流经你的伪装世界，构成你建造构造物的材料，渗透你世界中的每个原子与分子，却并非源自你的世界。也就是说，它并非源自你的伪装世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We are speaking of course here of the ordinary physical environment. The chemical, biological, electrical and psychic functions of the self are directly connected to the physical universe as a whole. Theoretically the influence of a particular given self is endless, and not only in so far as your own physical camouflage time universe is concerned. The influence of any given self reaches also into realities that are not bounded by space and time.
quotes.translation: 我们这里当然是在谈论普通的物质环境。自我的化学、生物、电性与心灵功能直接与整个物质宇宙相连。理论上，特定自我的影响力是无穷尽的，且不仅限于你们自己的物质伪装时间宇宙。任何特定自我的影响力也延伸至不受时空限制的实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We are working slow in some respects, but building a firm foundation. Experiments will be conducted, for example, as far as traveling through your camouflage space is concerned; and not only will this traveling be effected, but the physical form must be apparent to others in two places at once, so to speak. Material must be carefully gathered by the personality in its secondary location, to make such experiments effective in scientific circles.
quotes.translation: 我们在某些方面进展缓慢，但正在奠定坚实基础。例如，将进行穿越你们伪装空间的实验；不仅这种穿越会实现，而且可以说，物质形态必须同时在两个地方对他人显现。人格必须在其次要位置仔细收集材料，才能使这类实验在科学界产生效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You construct your own camouflage existence as the spider constructs his web, but you are not aware of the threads. You do not understand that they originate within yourself, although it is very simple to smile as the lowly spider weaves its web. The spiders construction is severely limited to one plane, but this is not the case with your constructions, which may have reality on many planes at once, and in ways with which you are not familiar.
quotes.translation: 你构建自己的伪装存在，如同蜘蛛编织它的网，但你并未觉察到那些丝线。你不明白它们源自你自身，尽管当卑微的蜘蛛织网时，你很容易报以微笑。蜘蛛的构造严格局限于一个平面，但你的构造并非如此——它们可能同时在许多层面具有实相，且以你不熟悉的方式运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You see, to me these things are closely associated and connected in an overall concept pattern, and yet I must give them to you one at a time, and take pages to make the connection clear. One of mankind's weaknesses has always been his impatience and his preoccupation with camouflage patterns on his plane. It is this impatience that made him attempt to know himself by examining the outside world, rather than exploring what was within himself.
quotes.translation: 你看，这些事物在我眼中都紧密相连，属于一个整体概念模式，但我必须逐一呈现给你们，并用数页篇幅阐明其中的关联。人类的一个弱点始终是急躁，以及执着于自身层面的伪装模式。正是这种急躁，使人类试图通过检视外在世界来认识自己，而非探索内在的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: And since you are not, you do not have the peculiar sets of camouflage perception necessary to experience existence within them. Now. Within the same space and time that you at this moment occupy, there are numberless planes of reality. You simply do not have the camouflage equipment to perceive them.
quotes.translation: 既然你们并非如此，便不具备体验那些存在所需的特殊伪装感知系统。此刻，在你们所占据的同一时空里，存在着无数实相层面。你们只是缺乏感知它们的伪装设备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As a rule there is little communication, you see, through those uncamouflaged or undifferentiated areas. They act in fact as boundaries, even while they represent the basic stuff of which all camouflage is composed. Without the camouflage, you see, you would perceive nothing using the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 通常而言，通过那些未经伪装或未分化的区域，几乎不存在交流。它们实际上充当着边界，即便它们同时代表着构成所有伪装的基本原料。你看，若没有伪装，你们将无法运用物质感官感知任何事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner senses deal with what actually is. The inner senses are the carriers of our fuel, that is, they can be likened to the various cars of our imaginary train. It takes some doing to be aware of this fuel, since it is so instantly transformed by the outer senses into the stuff of camouflage. The process involved is subconscious. You can hardly catch yourself at it, and yet with training you will be able to catch yourself in the act.
quotes.translation: 内在感官处理的是实际存在的事物。内在感官是我们燃料的载体，也就是说，它们可以被比作我们想象中火车的各个车厢。要意识到这种燃料需要费些功夫，因为它会立即被外在感官转化为伪装系统的材料。这个过程是潜意识的。你几乎无法捕捉到自己在进行这种转化，但通过训练，你将能够当场觉察到自己的行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is extremely difficult, I should imagine. Nevertheless, even when an inner self has sent out a new outer ego upon a new camouflage venture, the previous ego is still afforded an almost unlimited avenue for development. There are many possibilities for it. It can choose to remain what it is, one ego. It will then remain in a somewhat subordinate position to the inner self, but in no more of a subordinate position than it was earlier.
quotes.translation: 我想这应该极其困难。然而，即使内在自我已经派出了一个全新的外在自我去进行新的伪装冒险，先前的自我仍然拥有几乎无限的发展途径。它有许多可能性。它可以选择保持原样，作为一个自我存在。那么它将保持在内在自我之下稍显从属的位置，但并不会比之前更加从属。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As you are not aware of many so-called realities with which your own cat is familiar, so you are completely unaware of other universes that coexist with your own. Your outer senses are equipped to perceive your own camouflage patterns. They are not equipped to deal with other camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 就像你无法意识到你的猫所熟悉的许多所谓实相一样，你也完全无法意识到与你的宇宙共存的其他宇宙。你的外在感官被设计用来感知你自己的伪装模式。它们并不具备处理其他伪装模式的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Because I say that you actually create the typical camouflage patterns of your own physical universe yourselves, by use of the inner vitality of the universe in the same manner that you form a pattern with your breath on a glass pane, I do not necessarily mean that you are the creators of the universe. I am merely saying that you are the creators of the physical world as you know it -- and herein, my beloved friends, lies a vast tale.
quotes.translation: 我说你们实际上通过运用宇宙的内在活力，以在玻璃窗上哈气成形的同样方式，自己创造出你们物质宇宙的典型伪装模式，这并不必然意味着你们是宇宙的创造者。我只是说你们是你们所知的物质世界的创造者——而在此，我亲爱的朋友们，藏着一个宏大的故事。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now, so do the cells in your own body have self-consciousness and individuality to some extent, and so on a different scale entirely do they make decisions. Their decisions affect you, though they have but vague awareness that you exist as a whole at all. Their decisions indirectly affect your manipulations of camouflage, and of course directly influence your whole state of being. The cells are developed to the fullest at this time.
quotes.translation: 同样地，你们身体内的细胞也拥有某种程度的自我意识和个体性，并在完全不同的尺度上做出决定。它们的决定会影响你们，尽管它们对你们作为一个整体的存在只有模糊的认知。它们的决定间接影响你们对伪装的操作，当然也直接影响你们的整个存在状态。此时细胞已发展到最充分的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now back to the point. When however sciences progress on various planes, then visitations become less accidental and more planned. However, since the inhabitants of each plane are bound by the materializations or materialized patterns of that plane, they bring this particular materialization pattern or camouflaged vitality pattern with them. Certain kinds of sciences cannot operate without it. When the inhabitants of a plane have learned mental science patterns, then they are to a great degree freed from the more regular camouflage patterns. This applies to a higher plane than mine, generally speaking, although my plane is further along in this science than your own.
quotes.translation: 现在回到正题。当科学在各个层面取得进展时，来访就变得较少偶然、更多有计划。然而，由于每个层面的居民都受该层面的物质化或物质化模式所束缚，他们会带着这种特定的物质化模式或伪装活力模式前来。某些科学若没有这种模式就无法运作。当一个层面的居民学会了心智科学模式，他们就在很大程度上摆脱了较常规的伪装模式。一般而言，这适用于比我所在的层面更高的层面，尽管我的层面在这门科学上比你们的层面更先进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have said that the brain is the mind in camouflage, and so it is. It is the portion of the mind that is more or less observable to the surgeon, and the part of the mind that reacts to camouflage pattern, and the part that can be explored and tampered with, though this is dangerous indeed.
quotes.translation: 我曾说过，大脑是伪装中的心智，事实正是如此。它是心智中或多或少能被外科医生观察到的部分，是心智中对伪装模式做出反应的部分，也是可以被探索和干预的部分——尽管这确实危险。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is, in no circumstance, any closed system. Action therefore flows within all systems and realities. Your physical senses are therefore adapted to deal with a particular camouflage system. They are therefore only equipped to perceive the realities within the physical camouflage field.
quotes.translation: 在任何情况下都不存在封闭系统。因此，行动在所有系统和实相中流动。你们的物质感官因此被设计来应对特定的伪装系统。它们只能被装备去感知物质伪装场域内的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: If you use psychological time as I have told you, you will get immediate firsthand experience of many facets of reality which take me pages to explain with the indirect use of words. All entities basically are self-aware portions of energy or vitality. They are self-generating and there is no possibility of thinking in terms of either beginning or end. Again, it is only your own camouflage- imprisoned data which makes you think that everything has a beginning and an end.
quotes.translation: 如果你们按照我告诉你们的方式运用心理时间，你们将直接获得许多实相层面的第一手经验，而这些经验若用间接的文字描述，需要我花费数页篇幅。所有存有本质上都是能量或活力的自我觉知部分。它们是自我生成的，无法以起点或终点的概念来思考。再次强调，正是你们被伪装禁锢的数据，才使你们认为万物皆有始有终。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your scientists' idea of an expanding universe is so dependent upon your own limited theories that it becomes very difficult to make the matter plain. Again I entreat you to practice with the use of psychological time, for here the inner senses are given the greatest freedom from camouflage. And experiencing the resulting inner expansion, you will perhaps come somewhat closer to the ideas involved in our real expanding universe.
quotes.translation: 你们科学家关于宇宙膨胀的观念如此依赖于你们自身有限的理论，以至于很难把这个问题说清楚。我再次恳请你们练习使用心理时间，因为在这里内在感官能最大程度地摆脱伪装。通过体验由此产生的内在扩张，你们或许能更接近我们真实膨胀宇宙所涉及的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (From the 58th session for June 1, 1964:) Ruburt and myself are offshoots of the same entity. The difference in time is but a camouflage distortion. The entity was a particularly strong one, and many of its egos have made the decision to turn into entities ... And now, my dear patient Joseph, may I tell you that you are also part of that same entity -- and this is one of the reasons why I am able to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年6月1日第58节课：）鲁柏和我都是同一个存有的分支。时间上的差异不过是一种伪装扭曲。这个存有特别强大，它的许多自我都决定转化为存有……现在，我亲爱的耐心约瑟夫，请允许我告诉你，你也是同一个存有的一部分——这也是我能够与你们两人沟通的原因之一。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Because Ruburt deals in words it is easy for me to communicate in this manner. That is, Ruburt automatically translates inner data given by me into coherent, valid and faithful camouflage patterns, into words. The data that I give is not actually sound on my part. The transference of my data is automatic and instantaneous on Ruburt's part and is performed through the inner workings of the mind, the inner senses and the brain.
quotes.translation: 因为鲁柏擅长处理文字，所以我很容易以这种方式沟通。也就是说，鲁柏自动将我提供的内在资料转化为连贯、有效且忠实的伪装模式，转化为文字。我提供的资料实际上并非声音形式。鲁柏方面对资料的传递是自动且瞬间完成的，通过心智的内在运作、内在感官和大脑来实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Any such signs involve camouflage patterns and do not actually represent direct experience. This is not, for example, my voice. It is a representation or approximation of my voice for your edification. Furthermore in your terms I do not have a voice. Nevertheless it is a valid representation and if I must say so myself, and that's a pun, the voice is very much like the voice I would use, though Frank had a different one.
quotes.translation: 任何此类迹象都涉及伪装模式，并不代表直接经验。例如，这并非我的声音。它是为了启迪你们而对我声音的一种再现或近似。此外，按你们的说法，我并没有声音。然而，这是一种有效的再现，恕我直言（这是个双关语），这声音非常像我本会使用的声音，尽管弗兰克的声音不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: On one level they could be said not to exist, and yet they do exist. While in your dream, you are able to see and touch and move about in these locations. It is only when you awake that they escape you. This should be considered along with our material on the expanding universe, since dream locations represent, certainly, a reality, even a framework that has no existence in your space; and measured purely along the lines used to measure your space, you would receive no hint at all of their existence or reality. Measured purely in terms of your camouflage conceptions, many things which you know to exist would seem not to exist.
quotes.translation: 在某一层面上，可以说它们并不存在，然而它们确实存在。当你在梦中时，你能够看到、触摸并在这些地点四处移动。只有当你醒来时，它们才离你而去。这一点应与我们关于膨胀宇宙的资料一并考虑，因为梦中的地点无疑代表了一种实相，甚至是一个在你们空间中不存在的架构；若纯粹以测量你们空间的方法来衡量，你根本得不到任何关于它们存在或实相的暗示。若纯粹以你们的伪装概念来衡量，许多你知道存在的事物似乎并不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I am not saying that you should not believe the evidence of your senses; I am waiting for you to say that. We know that our so-called tables are not solid. Even your science knows this now, and yet your eyes see the table as solid. Face up to it, my dear lovelies: Your senses lie. The table is a conglomeration of quickly-moving atoms and molecules but you see it as a table, and you see it as solid. Your senses, and again this is to bring John-Philip up to date, your senses are perceptron of a camouflage physical world which is created by the inner self through the use of mental enzymes in a pattern set by the mental genes.
quotes.translation: 我并非说你们不应相信感官的证据；我在等你们说出这句话。我们知道所谓的桌子并非固体。甚至你们的科学现在也知道了这一点，但你们的眼睛却看到桌子是固体的。面对现实吧，我亲爱的可爱们：你们的感官在说谎。桌子是快速运动的原子和分子的集合体，但你们却把它看作一张桌子，并视为固体。你们的感官——再次强调，这是为了让约翰-菲利普跟上进度——你们的感官是对一个伪装物质世界的感知器，这个世界由内在自我通过使用精神酶素，按照精神基因设定的模式创造而成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When I speak of the subconscious in this manner, I speak of course of that larger portion which deals with the inner realities. I want to give you more detailed information about the inner realities themselves. Actually they do not parallel the outer senses, and this will sound appalling to you I'm afraid, simply because there is nothing to be seen, smelled, heard or touched in the manner in which you are accustomed. This is extremely hard to explain, since I do not want to give you the idea that existence without your particular set of camouflage patterns is bland and innocuous, because this is not the case.
quotes.translation: 当我如此谈及潜意识时，自然指的是那个与内在实相打交道的主要部分。我想给你们提供关于内在实相本身的更详细信息。实际上它们并不与外在感官平行，恐怕这会让你们感到震惊，仅仅因为你们所习惯的看、闻、听、触的方式在这里完全不存在。这极难解释，因为我不想让你们产生这样的印象：没有你们那套特定的伪装模式的存在是平淡无奇的，事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience, or any mystical experience, is sometimes apt to put you in touch with what may seem to you to be a future self. This self of course, again, always existed. The inner self has the ability to delve beneath all your camouflage data to perceive these other reality systems. For the fullest development however these perceptions must be made conscious. Even the ego must become aware of them.
quotes.translation: 迷幻体验或任何神秘体验，有时容易让你们接触到看似未来自我的东西。当然，这个自我始终存在。内在自我有能力深入你们所有伪装数据之下，去感知这些其他实相系统。然而，为了最充分的发展，这些感知必须被有意识地认知。甚至自我也必须意识到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Hypnotism is important merely as a tool to release the conscious personality from the camouflage inhibitions. It then allows knowledge to rise up. In ordinary circumstances the conscious self deals mainly with camouflage existence. This is after all primarily its purpose.
quotes.translation: 催眠之所以重要，仅仅因为它是一种工具，能将意识人格从伪装抑制中释放出来。它随后让知识得以浮现。在通常情况下，意识自我主要处理伪装存在。毕竟这首先是它的目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: One takes up space in your universe and the other does not. The universe expands in the manner that a dream expands, taking up no camouflage space. This does not mean that there is no growth involved in the expansion of the universe. This does not imply that there is no movement. It simply implies an existence and an expansion of a qualitative manner, beyond your present measurements or complete comprehension.
quotes.translation: 一个在你的宇宙中占据空间，另一个则不。宇宙以梦境扩展的方式扩展，不占据任何伪装空间。这并不意味着宇宙的扩展不涉及成长，也不意味着没有运动。它仅仅暗示一种存在和一种性质上的扩展，超出了你们目前的测量或完全理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These camouflage ideas are as real and as useful, if not more so, than physical camouflage patterns. They also enable you to manipulate, and they of course also serve to hide you from or shield you from direct reality experiences which you cannot handle on your plane.
quotes.translation: 这些伪装观念与物理伪装模式一样真实且有用，甚至可能更有用。它们也使你们能够操控，当然也起到隐藏或保护你们的作用，使你们免于直接面对在你们层面上无法处理的实相体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Every action affects every other action. Mental enclosures are energy units possessing all the characteristics of such units as I have previously given you. You know that all action is basically mental action, as fields replenish each other. As no action is meaningless, so the dream universe and the physical universe constantly replenish each other, and mental actions are performed in both universes, being camouflage acting symbols for inner action.
quotes.translation: 每个行动都影响其他所有行动。心灵围场是能量单元，具备我之前给予你们的这类单元的所有特征。你们知道所有行动本质上都是心灵行动，如同场域相互补充。由于没有行动是无意义的，因此梦境宇宙和物理宇宙不断相互补充，心灵行动在两个宇宙中都被执行，作为内在行动的伪装行动符号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you leave the physical system after reincarnations, you have learned the lessons, and you are literally no longer a member of the human race in those terms, for you elect to leave it. Only the conscious self dwells within it in any case, and it is other portions of your personality who simultaneously dwell within the other training systems. In other more advanced systems, thoughts and emotions are automatically and immediately translated into action, into camouflage, into whatever approximation of matter there exists. Therefore the lessons must be taught and learned well.
quotes.translation: 当你历经轮回离开物质系统后，你已学会所有功课，从那个层面而言你已不再是人类族群的一员，因为你选择离开它。无论如何，只有意识自我栖居于该系统内，而你人格的其他部分同时栖居于其他训练系统中。在更先进的系统里，思想与情感会自动且立即转化为行动、转化为伪装、转化为任何近似物质的存在形式。因此这些功课必须被妥善教导与学习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is true that Joseph receives much data through inner visions. In the past he has more or less translated this data automatically into a new camouflage pattern, in other words into a painting, without realizing that he had received any vision at all. You can learn, Joseph, to use your other inner senses as I tell you more about them.
quotes.translation: 约瑟确实通过内在视像接收许多资料。过去他或多或少会自动将这些资料转化为新的伪装模式——换言之转化为画作——却完全未察觉自己曾接收任何视像。约瑟，当你更了解我所说的其他内在感官时，你就能学会运用它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You know then from past discussions that the dream world as you know it is the result of your awareness of a plane of existence which you help create, and in which you manipulate. In other words, on an unconscious level you here manipulate in another plane of existence entirely, one in which your conscious camouflage ego may not enter.
quotes.translation: 根据过往讨论你已知晓，你所认知的梦境世界，是你对某个实相层面的觉知结果——这个层面由你协助创造，并在其中运作。换言之，在无意识层面你完全运作于另一个实相层面，而你的意识伪装自我无法进入其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner senses can perceive other camouflage patterns, with training. As I mentioned, there are universes coexistent with your own, but your camouflage outer senses cannot perceive these. Nor with your limited cause and effect theories will you ever get very far.
quotes.translation: 内在感官经过训练后能感知其他伪装模式。如我所言，有些宇宙与你们的宇宙并存，但你们的外在伪装感官无法感知这些。以你们有限的因果理论，也永远无法深入探究。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Any such communications coming through the inner senses will exist in your psychological time. I have said also that this psychological time operates during sleep and during quiet times of consciousness. Now in dreams and in the dream framework you have the feeling of experiencing many hours, or even days. These days or hours that you seem to experience in dreams are not recorded by the physical body, and are outside of your physical time camouflage. If in a dream for example you experience within the framework two days, physically you do not age for these two days.
quotes.translation: 任何通过内在感官传递的讯息都将存在于你们的心理时间中。我也说过，这种心理时间在睡眠期间和意识宁静时刻运作。在梦境与梦的架构中，你们会感觉经历了数小时甚至数天。这些在梦中看似经历的时日，肉体并未记录，且存在于你们物理时间伪装之外。例如，若在梦境架构中经历了两天，肉体并不会因这两天而衰老。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As I mentioned, the sixth inner sense involves something that can be likened to what you call the instincts, except that it is a property of the inner self. Consider a spider spinning a web. The web is a camouflage pattern that definitely exists on your plane. Here your simple spider is using his sixth sense, for these senses are the latent property of other living things, and not restricted to mankind.
quotes.translation: 如我所言，第六内在感官涉及某种可类比于你们所谓本能的东西，但它是内在自体的属性。试想蜘蛛结网。网是确实存在于你们层面的伪装模式。此处，你们简单的蜘蛛正在运用其第六感，因为这些感官是其他生物的内在属性，并非人类所独有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: To those who ask concerning the origin of that inward energy you may say that the inwardness came from itself. In the spacious present there simply is no past. There can be no point of origin in time as you conceive it. It is only within your camouflage perspective that this remark appears illogical, but this does not mean that you still cannot grasp some of its meaning, using your own inner experience.
quotes.translation: 对于那些询问内在能量起源的人，你可以说内在性源于自身。在广阔的当下中根本没有过去。在你所理解的时间中不可能存在起源点。只有在你那伪装视角中，这句话才显得不合逻辑，但这并不意味着你无法运用自身的内在经验来领会其部分含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This conception is to blame for the superstitious attitudes, however, concerning the inner world as a whole, and some of mans misconceptions have been ludicrous and pathetic. I think now mainly of his giving the immaterial inner self a dwelling place formed of physical camouflage patterns. In other words, a physical heaven and hell.
quotes.translation: 这种观念导致了人们对内在世界整体的迷信态度，而人类的一些误解既荒谬又可悲。我此刻主要想到的是，他将非物质的內在自我安置在一个由物质伪装模式构成的居所中。换言之，即物质的天堂与地狱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In other words these idea camouflage structures are prerequisites for your physical structures, and to the extent that these idea structures evolve, to that extent can your physical structures change. This is why, for example, you are hampered even in your physical constructions by the idea structures of time that you have erected.
quotes.translation: 换言之，这些观念伪装结构是你们物质结构的先决条件，并且随着这些观念结构的演化程度，你们的物质结构也能相应改变。这就是为什么，举例来说，你们甚至在自己所建立的物质构造中，也会受到自己所构建的时间观念结构的束缚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These fundamental laws are followed on many levels in your own universe. So far I have given you but one, which is value fulfillment. In your physical universe this rule is followed as physical growth. The entity follows it through the cycle of [simultaneous] reincarnations. The species of mankind, and all other species in your universe on your particular horizontal plane, follow this law [value fulfillment] under the auspices of evolution (my emphasis).5 In other camouflage realities, this law is carried through in different manners, but it is never ignored.
quotes.translation: 这些基本法则在你们宇宙的许多层面上都被遵循。到目前为止，我只给了你们一个法则，那就是价值完成。在你们的物质宇宙中，这个法则以物质成长的形式被遵循。存有通过[同时]转世的循环遵循它。人类物种以及你们特定水平面上宇宙中的所有其他物种，都在进化的庇护下遵循这一法则[价值完成]（我的强调）。5 在其他伪装实相中，这一法则以不同的方式被贯彻，但它从未被忽视。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: They will be and they are prisoners of their own tools. More galaxies will seemingly be discovered, more mysterious radio stars will be perceived, until the scientists realize that something is desperately wrong. Instruments designed to measure the vibrations with which scientists are familiar will be designed and redesigned. All sorts, finally, of seemingly impossible phenomena will be discovered with these instruments. The instruments will be designed to catch certain camouflages and since they are expertly thought out they will perform their function.
quotes.translation: 他们将是，并且已经是他们自己工具的囚徒。更多的星系看似会被发现，更多神秘的射电星会被感知，直到科学家们意识到某些地方出了严重问题。旨在测量科学家们熟悉的振动频率的仪器会被设计再设计。最终，各种看似不可能的现象会通过这些仪器被发现。这些仪器被设计用来捕捉某些伪装，由于它们被精心构思，它们将发挥其功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They represent a more or less true account of the nature of your camouflage universe, but if they are understood as being limited to your camouflage environment only, then your scientists would not attempt to use them as yardsticks to measure other universes.
quotes.translation: 它们或多或少真实地描述了你们伪装宇宙的本质，但如果它们被理解为仅限于你们的伪装环境，那么你们的科学家就不会试图将它们用作衡量其他宇宙的标尺。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: So should man's ego be. When man's ego turns instead into a shell, when instead of interpreting outside conditions it reacts too violently against them, then it hardens, becomes an imprisoning form that begins to snuff out important data, and to keep enlarging information from the inner self. The purpose of the ego is protective. It is also a device to enable the inner self to inhabit the physical plane. It is in other words a camouflage.
quotes.translation: 人类的自我也应如此。当人类的自我转而变成一副硬壳，不再诠释外界状况，反而对外界状况反应过度激烈时，它就会硬化，变成一座牢笼，开始扼杀重要数据，并不断阻隔来自内在自我的信息。自我的目的是保护性的，它也是让内在自我得以栖身物质层面的装置。换言之，它是一种伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is complicated in the telling. As I mentioned they carry their own particular camouflage with them. You recognize it as not your own. Taking off at right angles involves another one of your natural laws which are not natural laws, but seem to be because this is how things look from where you are. I'll take this up at a later date if I do not go into it in the later part of this discussion.
quotes.translation: 说起来很复杂。如我所提，它们随身携带自己特定的伪装。你认出那不是你的伪装。以直角起飞涉及另一条你们的自然法则——这些法则并非真正的自然法则，之所以看似如此，是因为从你们所在的位置看事物就是这般模样。若我在本次讨论的后半部分未深入探讨，日后我会再谈此事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The dream world and the mind are touched by time, and exist in it only in so far as these realities dip into the camouflage universe. Basically both the dream world and the ideas of the inner mind do not have their existence in time, although they may be visible from the perspective of time, viewed from the physical form.
quotes.translation: 梦境世界与心灵受到时间触及，且仅当这些实相涉入伪装宇宙时才存在于时间之中。从根本上说，梦境世界与内在心灵的意念并不存在于时间里，尽管从物质形态的视角、从时间的维度来看，它们或许可见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I am far more however than this portion of me that you contact, for it is only one portion of me that experienced that reality. (Pause.) It is highly important that the material not be distorted then, for most communications take place on far different levels than this, so closely connected with your own system that even the most undistorted material is highly distorted, because the communicators themselves are so closely involved with camouflages, and do not realize that they create the realities which they then describe.
quotes.translation: 然而我远比你们所接触到的这个部分要广大得多，因为那只是体验过那个实相的我的一个部分。（停顿）因此，确保资料不被扭曲极为重要，因为大多数沟通发生在远不同于此的层面，这些层面与你们的系统紧密相连，以至于即使是最未经扭曲的资料也会被高度扭曲，因为沟通者本身与伪装如此密切纠缠，以至于他们并未意识到自己创造了随后所描述的那些实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The fact remains that the inner senses are equipped to let you perceive inner reality. You can use them; and for Philip's information the evidence of the inner senses is immediate, and vivid, and direct--much more vivid, Philip, than for example your camouflage experience of the color red. Everyone sees red differently. There is no absolute objective red but only gradations of the idea red.
quotes.translation: 事实仍然是，内在感官被设计来让你感知内在实相。你可以运用它们；为了菲利普的资讯，内在感官的证据是即时、生动且直接的——菲利普，这比你对红色的伪装体验要生动得多。每个人看到的红色都不同。没有绝对客观的红色，只有红色这个理念的渐变层次。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Basically, however, no system is closed. Energy flows freely from one to another, or rather permeates each. It is only the camouflage structure that gives the impression of closed systems, and the law of inertia does not apply. It appears to be a reality only within your own framework and because of your limited focus.
quotes.translation: 然而基本上，没有系统是封闭的。能量自由地从一个系统流向另一个系统，或者更确切地说，它渗透每一个系统。只有伪装结构才给人以封闭系统的印象，而惯性定律并不适用。它只在你们自己的架构内，并且由于你们有限的焦点，才显得像是一个实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The camouflage patterns within your own physical universe are coherent enough so that all individuals of a given species appear to perceive more or less the same surroundings. There are groupings of perceptions belonging to various species, but all of these perceptions are not inherent in each species. We will cover this more thoroughly later. However, I wanted to make the statement here.
quotes.translation: 你们物质宇宙中的伪装模式具有足够的一致性，因此特定物种的所有个体似乎都能感知到大致相同的环境。不同物种的感知各有归类，但这些感知并非每个物种与生俱来。我们之后会更详细地讨论这一点，不过我想在此先作说明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: But the minute, the physical minute, that you try to transpose these visions upon the physical minute, then you have lost them. Many times I am sure, in so-called daydreaming, you have lost track of physical time, and before you know it the experience of inner duration has entered in. Physical time so- called, that is clock time, is one of the latest and most artificial of your camouflages. It has nothing to do with your particular plane. It is a human invention of which your animals are blissfully ignorant.
quotes.translation: 但当你试图将这些幻象转译到物质时间的那一刻——那物质的一刻——你就失去了它们。我确信，在所谓的白日梦中，你们常常会忘记物理时间，不知不觉间内在时间的体验便已介入。所谓的物理时间，即钟表时间，是你们最晚近、最人为的伪装之一。它与你们特定的层面毫无关联，它是人类的一项发明，而你们的动物对此浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When I speak of the electrical universe, indeed this represents but one more facet of reality. But all of these universes are indeed one. You remember our discussion concerning density of intensities. Here is the secret, if you could but see it: Even though the electrical universe might seem to you far divorced from what you know, nevertheless you dwell within it. Your own emotions have an independent existence within it. And your own possibilities within it are unlimited. But even this is also a camouflage.
quotes.translation: 当我谈及电性宇宙时，这确实只是实相的另一个面向。但所有这些宇宙其实是一体的。你们还记得我们关于强度密度的讨论吗？秘密就在这里，只要你们能看见：即使电性宇宙在你们看来与所知的一切相去甚远，你们仍栖身其中。你们自己的情感在其中拥有独立的存在，而你们在其中拥有无限的可能性。但即便如此，这也是一种伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This tinge of time is an attribute of the physical camouflage form only, and even then the relationship between time and ideas, and time and dreams, is a nebulous one. As I have mentioned, though you experience two days in a dream, you are while in that dream free from the time involved, in that you do not age two days, although you have psychologically experienced that apparent time.
quotes.translation: 这种时间的色调仅是物质伪装形式的属性，即便如此，时间与思想、时间与梦境之间的关系也是模糊不清的。如我所提，尽管你在梦中经历了两天，但你在那个梦境中并不受时间束缚，因为你并未因此衰老两天，尽管你心理上体验了那段看似的时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: "Your scientists can count their elements.... That is, they will create more and discover more until they are ready to go out of their minds, because they will always create [physical] 'camouflages' of the real [nonphysical] thing. And while they create instruments to deal with smaller and smaller particles, they will actually see smaller and smaller particles, seemingly without end.
quotes.translation: "你们的科学家可以计算他们的元素……也就是说，他们会创造更多并发现更多，直到他们准备发疯，因为他们总是会创造真实（非物质）事物的（物质）'伪装'。当他们制造仪器来处理越来越小的粒子时，他们实际上会看到越来越小的粒子，似乎永无止境。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
