source_raw.title: 1. In Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality, I wrote in Note 7 for Session 681 that atoms are "processes" rather than things. The classical conception of the typical atom as being composed of a neat nucleus of indivisible protons and neutrons circled by electrons is largely passé, although for convenience's sake we may still describe the atom that way. (In those terms, the one exception is the hydrogen atom, which evidently consists of but one proton and one electron cloud, or "smear.") For the simple purposes of this note, then, I'm leaving out considerations involving quantum mechanics, which concept repudiates the idea of "particles" to begin with. (And surely that notion involves more than a little of the psychic, or "irrational." What a heretical thought from the scientific viewpoint!) But each atom of whatever element is an amazingly complicated, finely balanced assemblage of forces and particles woven together in exquisite detail--one of the more basic examples of the unending and stupendous creativity, order, and design of nature, or consciousness, or All That Is.

quotes.text: The traveling consciousness as you know it often experiences the feeling of motion and movement through space. This is because there is still translation through the physical senses. You are moving more effectively within camouflage reality, but you are still dealing with it. The focus of your attention has changed somewhat, but you are still strongly relating to the physical field.
quotes.translation: 你所知的旅行意识常常经历穿越空间的运动感。这是因为仍然通过物质感官进行转译。你在伪装现实中移动得更有效，但你仍在与之打交道。你的注意力焦点有所改变，但你仍然强烈地与物质场域相关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: These body forms however are necessary camouflages, for you cannot yet think of identity without some kind of physical body. Therefore you project yourself in a body form. It varies according to your own abilities, and without it you would feel lost indeed. The form itself is not important, but the form can tell you something about the dimension in which you are having experience.
quotes.translation: 然而这些身体形态是必要的伪装，因为你尚无法想象没有某种物质身体的身份认同。因此你以身体形态投射自己。它根据你自身能力而变化，没有它你确实会感到迷失。形态本身并不重要，但形态能告诉你关于你正在体验的维度的一些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You block out the realization of nontime, and accept your ideas of time along with the camouflage structure, for one is dependent upon the other. Once you accept physical matter as you know it, then the time system is indispensable. In those projections still within your system, you are still bound by a time relationship, in that it seems to you that perception operates as usual.
quotes.translation: 你屏蔽了对非时间的认知，并接受你的时间观念与伪装结构并存，因为两者相互依存。一旦你接受你所知的物质，时间系统就不可或缺。在你系统内的那些投射中，你仍受时间关系束缚，因为对你而言感知运作如常。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Other kinds of consciousness coexist within the same "space" that your world inhabits. They do not perceive your physical objects, for their reality is composed of a different camouflage structure. You do not perceive them, and generally speaking they do not perceive you. This is a general statement, however, for various points of your realities can and do coincide, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 其他种类的意识与你的世界共存于同一"空间"中。它们感知不到你的物质物体，因为它们的实相由不同的伪装结构构成。你感知不到它们，一般而言它们也感知不到你。然而这只是概括性陈述，因为你们实相的各种交汇点可以也确实会重合，可以这么说。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner senses operate on all planes and under all circumstances. The outer senses vary according to plane and circumstance. The outer senses are dependable only in terms of the definite plane for which they were constructed. Their purpose of course is to enable the conscious personality to recognize as valid camouflage patterns which are only valid under certain conditions.
quotes.translation: 内在感官在所有层面和所有情况下运作。外在感官则根据层面和情况而变化。外在感官仅在它们被构建的特定层面上可靠。它们的目的是让有意识的人格能够识别仅在特定条件下有效的伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Time therefore is formed out of and from nontime. (Long pause.) Nontime is psychological experience, psychological reality, and time is always at its service. (Long pause.) Entities then form the time in which they seem to dwell. (Long pause.) Experience itself is always plastic, and again, form is not dependent upon mass. Mass belongs to your camouflage system. Form does not.
quotes.translation: 因此，时间是由非时间形成并从中产生的。（长停顿）非时间是心理体验、心理实相，而时间始终为其服务。（长停顿）存有们于是形成了他们似乎居住其中的时间。（长停顿）体验本身始终是可塑的，而且，形态并不依赖于质量。质量属于你们的伪装系统，而形态则不然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: However, the inner senses are aware of the body's own physical data at all times, while the outer senses are concerned with the body mainly in its relationship to camouflage environment. In other words the inner senses have an immediate, constant knowledge of the body in a way that the outer senses do not.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在感官始终知晓身体自身的物理数据，而外在感官主要关注身体与伪装环境的关系。换言之，内在感官以外在感官所不具备的方式，对身体拥有直接、持续的认识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I spoke briefly of the form that appeared in the mirror. Now that appearance was something else again, and was somewhat in the nature of the experience you had much later. （See the 219th session.） You see you pick up the idea even with that form, then you attempt to translate that data into physical terms. The attempt is bound to bring distortions, but without the distortions you could not consciously perceive the data. The distortions in all cases form your physical camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 我曾简短地提到镜中出现的那个形相。那个形相又是另一回事，多少与你后来经历的性质相似（见第219节）。你看，即便是那个形相，你也先捕捉到意念，然后试图将那些资料转译为物质术语。这种尝试必然带来扭曲，但没有扭曲你就无法有意识地感知资料。在所有情况下，扭曲构成了你们的物质伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: As the outer senses of sight, sound and smell appear to reach outward, bringing data to the physical body from an outside observable camouflage pattern, so the inside senses seem to extend far inward, bringing important inner reality data to the physical body. There is also a transforming process here much like the moment that we have spoken of in the creation of a painting.
quotes.translation: 正如外在感官——视觉、听觉和嗅觉——看似向外延伸，从外部可观察的伪装模式中向物质身体传递资料，内在感官则似乎向内深入，将重要的内在实相资料传递给物质身体。这里也存在一个转化过程，与我们之前谈到的绘画创作中的那个时刻非常相似。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Such developments would mean the releasing and availability of added energy into your field, that would have endless possibilities in all directions. Ideas and concepts are nonphysical actualities that attract unaligned energy, direct and concentrate it. The dream world exists more closely in that spacious present of which the inner self is so aware. It is not as involved with camouflage constructions as your own universe, and its actions are somewhat limited within its own framework.
quotes.translation: 这类发展意味着额外能量将被释放并可供你们场域使用，这些能量在各个方向都拥有无限可能性。意念与概念是非物质的实相，它们吸引未定向的能量，引导并凝聚之。梦境世界更贴近那个内在自我如此觉察的广袤当下，它不像你们的宇宙那样与伪装建构紧密纠缠，其活动在其自身框架内也受到一定限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Using Ruburt's phrase, this may sound "far out," （in quotes）, but even by the year 2000 it will all sound quite reasonable, and long before that your scientists will come to conclusions much like these. It is simply much easier, and even more scientific, to achieve a so-called, again, objective view of your universe by going inward, than it is to attempt to escape your distortive atmosphere by going further outward, because in the outward direction you will only meet more camouflage.
quotes.translation: 借用鲁柏的说法，这听起来可能"很玄"（加引号），但即使到公元2000年，这一切都会显得相当合理，而且远在那之前，你们的科学家就会得出非常类似的结论。要获得所谓——再说一次——你们宇宙的客观视角，向内探索远比试图向外逃逸以摆脱扭曲氛围要简单得多，甚至更科学，因为向外走你只会遇到更多的伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The sentence is really meaningless however, because the physical senses themselves are camouflage, you see. There would be nothing to translate. It is only use of the inner senses that will allow you to perceive under these circumstances. Theoretically, if you can bridge the gap between various reincarnations, then you can bridge the gap between your system and another.
quotes.translation: 然而这句话其实毫无意义，因为物理感官本身就是伪装，你明白吗。根本没有什么可翻译的。只有运用内在感官，你才能在这些情况下感知。理论上，如果你能跨越不同转世之间的鸿沟，那么你也能跨越你的系统与另一个系统之间的鸿沟。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I will go into this more deeply also. I am merely presenting a brief outline of the direction in which this material will go in the future. If you will ignore the apparent distinction between inner and outer senses you will get along at a faster rate. Even though they are not different things I must speak of them differently because they appear so on your plane. This is caused of course by the typical camouflage distortion effect, which occurs on almost every plane to some extent.
quotes.translation: 我还会更深入地探讨这一点。我现在只是简要勾勒这些材料未来发展的方向。如果你忽略内在感官与外在感官之间的明显区别，你的进展会更快。尽管它们并非不同的事物，但我必须用不同的方式来谈论它们，因为在你们的层面上它们看起来确实不同。这当然是由典型的伪装扭曲效应造成的，这种效应几乎在每个层面上都或多或少地存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I suggest a brief break, and let me congratulate you my dear Joseph upon your latest manipulation of camouflage pattern in terms of your entryway. You will find it very beneficial. It will however mark the end of my suggestions. If possible heed the ones I have already made, but unless queried I will leave your physical situation at rest as it is very much better now.
quotes.translation: 我建议稍作休息，并祝贺你，我亲爱的约瑟夫，最近在入口处对伪装模式的巧妙运用。你会发现这非常有益，但这将是我建议的终点。若可能，请遵循我已提出的建议，但除非你主动询问，我将不再干预你的身体状况——它现在已好多了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I do not bring about the trance state in the manner of which you are speaking. Ruburt switches another channel on, through which my essence can enter more readily. There is the problem here of my entry also into your conscious minds. This does certainly involve a looking inward on Ruburt's part, but it is not self-hypnosis in the terms usually spoken of, merely a focusing upon an objective inner stimulus in much the same manner that you focus upon an outside camouflage stimulus.
quotes.translation: 我并非以你所描述的方式引发出神状态。鲁柏切换了另一条通道，使我的本质能更顺畅地进入。这里还存在我进入你们意识心智的问题。这确实涉及鲁柏对内在的审视，但并非通常所说的自我催眠，而只是聚焦于客观的内在刺激，其方式与你聚焦于外在伪装刺激完全相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: No system is a closed system. The framework of all systems is basically infinite. Any appearance of enclosure is the result of camouflage distortions, quite necessary within a given system so that the organisms within it can focus their main attentions to the problems within a particular system.
quotes.translation: 没有系统是封闭系统。所有系统的框架本质上是无限的。任何封闭的表象都是伪装扭曲的结果——这在特定系统内是必要的，以便其中的生物能将主要注意力集中于该特定系统的问题上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: He would in no way lose consciousness of who he was, and he would perceive these experiences, again, somewhat in the same manner that you perceive heat and cold. In your camouflage pattern you must adapt yourself to the effects of heat and cold, but our man in the inner world would not be under any such obligation. I am speaking now only of our first inner sense.
quotes.translation: 他绝不会丧失对自我身份的认知，并且会以类似你们感知冷热的方式体验这些经历。在你们的伪装模式中，必须适应冷热效应，但内在世界中的这个人却不受此约束。我现在仅讨论我们的第一内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Since both space and time are camouflages, to speak of traveling through them is basically meaningless. What is involved here is a transformation of energy, and on your plane an extension of personality essence that permits an extension of perception. I will make this clearer at a later date.
quotes.translation: 既然空间与时间皆为伪装，谈论穿越它们便基本毫无意义。此处涉及的是能量的转化，在你们的层面上，则是人格本质的延伸，从而允许感知的扩展。日后我会对此作更清晰的阐述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is important that you tie in this evolutionary material with previous data concerning the inner senses. The inner senses were always paramount in evolutionary development, being the impetus behind the physical formations; and themselves, through the use of mental enzymes, imprinting the data contained in the mental genes onto the physical camouflage material.
quotes.translation: 务必将这份进化资料与先前关于内在感官的论述联系起来。内在感官在进化发展中始终居于主导地位，是物质形态背后的驱动力；它们自身通过运用心灵酵素，将心灵基因所蕴含的数据印记在物质伪装材料之上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Again physically speaking, you will find nothing to contradict these assumptions, since physically to you they are all that you can experience or perceive. These root assumptions are the framework of your camouflage system. As you attempt to explore other realities you almost automatically interpret such data in terms of the root assumptions of your own system.
quotes.translation: 再次从物理角度来说，你找不到任何能反驳这些假设的证据，因为对你而言，物理层面就是你所能体验或感知的一切。这些根本假设构成了你伪装系统的框架。当你试图探索其他实相时，几乎会自动用自身系统的根本假设来解读这类资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You are beginning to perceive the holes in the camouflage, for I have pointed them out to you. They are doorways into inner realities, and other realities, as are these sessions. Those who have survived physical death in your terms, must use words in their communications, for you do not understand wordless communications. They themselves are far freer, however.
quotes.translation: 你已开始察觉伪装中的破绽，因为我已为你指出它们。这些破绽是通往内在实相与其他实相的门户，正如这些课程一样。那些在你认知中已度过物理死亡的人，在沟通时必须使用文字，因为你无法理解无言的沟通。然而他们自身却远为自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You must remember that the outer senses react to camouflage pattern. The statue actually imprisons vitality more than a painting or musical composition or poem, because it is bound to you by so many ties. I meant to make this plain earlier. I won't keep you any longer, lest you grow impatient with me tomorrow. At all costs I don't want to wear out my welcome.
quotes.translation: 你必须记住，外在感官对伪装模式产生反应。相较于绘画、音乐作品或诗歌，雕像实际上更禁锢生命力，因为它通过众多纽带与你紧密相连。我本应早些阐明这点。今晚不再多留你，以免明日你对我失去耐心。无论如何，我不想让自己变得不受欢迎。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In their materialization upon your plane, and as seen from your own camouflage perspective, you seem to be aware of new entities, but this is because of your own limited viewpoint. In your time scheme entities have had time to produce more fragmentary personalities, but in truth from your viewpoint these personalities can be seen to have changed long ago.
quotes.translation: 在你们层面的物质化过程中，从你们自身伪装视角来看，你们似乎意识到新的实体存在，但这只是因为你们有限的视角。在你们的时间架构中，实体已有时间产生更多片段人格，但事实上从你们的视角来看，这些人格早已改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The self, in this manner, looks about. The direction in which the self looks is not the self. In dreams the self looks elsewhere, and the "I" is a conscious "I", and the working ability is tremendous. The inner self perceives realities that it observes in many directions, being free from the intense focus within limited directions of camouflage existence.
quotes.translation: 自我以这种方式环顾四周。自我所注视的方向并非自我本身。在梦境中，自我注视别处，而"我"是一个有意识的"我"，其运作能力极为强大。内在自我感知到它在许多方向观察到的实相，因为它摆脱了伪装存在中有限方向的强烈聚焦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: All of the inner senses are not utilized to the same degree on any plane. Many planes are given over to the training in the use of one or two of the most important inner senses. I liked the analogy of the spider and his web because it is such a simple and uncomplicated example of camouflage construction, divorced from intermediaries such as ego or tools.
quotes.translation: 所有内在感官在任何层面上都不会被同等程度地使用。许多层面专门用于训练使用一两个最重要的内在感官。我喜欢蜘蛛与网的比喻，因为它是伪装建构如此简单明了的例子，脱离了自我或工具等中介。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The well-advanced personality then is aware of nontime, but can use the time illusions of others and can enter the particular camouflage structures. The nontime principle however operates in such a manner that a personality can only participate in the ways that I have described, in systems with which he has some familiarity because of his own experience.
quotes.translation: 高度进化的人格因此能觉察到非时间，但能运用他人的时间幻相，并进入特定的伪装结构。然而非时间原理的运作方式，使得人格只能以我所描述的方式，参与那些因其自身经验而有所熟悉的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is electrical energy. Quasars are distributed, so to speak, throughout all realities--throughout all universes, in other words. They do not conform to the camouflage patterns within any system outside of their own. They are not suns, planets, galaxies or universes in those terms.
quotes.translation: 这是电能。类星体可以说分布于所有实相——换言之，遍布所有宇宙。它们不遵循自身系统之外的任何系统内的伪装模式。就那些术语而言，它们不是恒星、行星、星系或宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: These simultaneous actions, happening at once, appear in multitudinous fields of activity. And it would seem from within those fields that time as you know it is involved. You know however that time is not involved. The appearance of this time is caused by the apparent changes or transformations of the action as it enters any given camouflage field.
quotes.translation: 这些同时发生的行动，瞬间呈现于众多活动场域。从那些场域内部看来，似乎涉及你所认知的时间。然而你明白时间并未涉入。这种时间表象是由行动进入任何特定伪装场域时发生的明显变化或转化所造成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is one of the reasons why breathing seems automatic, and why dreaming seems to confound your physical camouflage idea of time. It is perfectly within your present capabilities to understand that time, to your dreaming self, is very much like time to your waking inner self. But you must first disconnect the physical concept of time and watches.
quotes.translation: 这就是为什么呼吸看似自动进行，而梦境似乎混淆了你对时间的物质伪装概念的原因。你完全有能力理解：对你做梦的自我而言，时间非常类似于你清醒的内在自我所感知的时间。但你必须先断开关于时间和钟表的物质概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are in no danger however as long as you pursue your present course, but you are in peril as soon as you change it. You will find that these loose predictions will come to pass. You understand that free will always operates, this being a foregone conclusion. I also am practical in my way. And speaking of practicality, you would find it most beneficial even in dealing with your precious camouflage patterns if you would develop the use of your inner senses.
quotes.translation: 只要你坚持当前的道路，就不会有危险，但一旦改变它，你就会陷入险境。你会发现这些松散的预测将会应验。你明白自由意志始终在运作，这是毋庸置疑的。我也有自己务实的方式。说到务实，如果你能发展运用内在感官，即使处理你们珍贵的伪装模式也会大有裨益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Our relationship should enable you both to deal more adequately with the outside world. I will never suggest that you try to escape it. Your development of the inner senses will not blot out the outer world. It will enable you to see it more clearly for what it is, and therefore you will be able to manipulate camouflage patterns more adequately.
quotes.translation: 我们的关系应能使你们更妥善地处理外在世界。我绝不会建议你们试图逃避它。发展内在感官不会抹去外在世界，反而会让你更清晰地看清它的本质，从而更有效地操控伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The question has to do with the so-called creation of your universe, the introduction of entities upon it, and of course with the cause or causes behind such creation. You know by now that you create your own camouflage-patterned universe, and I have tried to cover some of the mechanisms involved in this continuous, seemingly automatic creation.
quotes.translation: 这个问题涉及你们所谓的宇宙创造、实体进入其中，当然也包括这种创造背后的原因或多种原因。你们现在已知自己创造了自身伪装模式的宇宙，我也曾尝试说明这种持续、看似自动的创造所涉及的若干机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: But since it is so difficult for man to even recognize the self that moves his own muscles and breathes his own breath, then I suppose it should not be startling that he cannot realize that this whole self also forms the camouflage world of physical appearance, in almost the same manner that he forms a pattern with his breath upon a glass pane.
quotes.translation: 但既然人类连驱动自身肌肉、呼吸自身气息的那个自我都难以认知，那么我想，他无法意识到这个完整的自我同样以几乎相同的方式——如同在玻璃窗上以气息形成图案——构建了物质外观的伪装世界，也就不足为奇了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is the case, but not the case. The choices are small to your way, but choice is not impossible. Actually there is choice, but the manipulation of camouflage is not developed along your lines. This does not mean that there is no consciousness in such species, nor does it mean there is no self-consciousness. There is, to a limited degree.
quotes.translation: 情况确实如此，却又并非如此。以你们的方式来看，选择是有限的，但选择并非不可能。实际上确实存在选择，只是对伪装的操控并非沿着你们的路线发展。这并不意味着这类物种没有意识，也不意味着没有自我意识。它们确实存在，只是程度有限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Initially this is mental action, an action event. This action event will then affect all other events, spiral inward and outward in all possible dimensions, and may be perceived in these dimensions in quite a different form from its original nature. In each system it can only be perceived according to the camouflage patterns inherent there.
quotes.translation: 这最初是心智行动，一个行动事件。此行动事件随后会影响所有其他事件，在所有可能的维度中向内向外螺旋扩展，并可能在这些维度中以与其原始本质截然不同的形式被感知。在每个系统中，它只能根据该系统中固有的伪装模式被感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is formed by the unconscious will for reasons of its own. It is a variation on the original pattern. I intend to tie this in for you later with a clearer explanation as to how you on your plane form your own camouflage universe, and to elucidate on the fact that form is not rigid, though it appears to be in many cases on your own plane.
quotes.translation: 它由无意识意志出于自身原因而形成。它是原始模式的一种变体。我打算稍后为你更清晰地解释你们如何在自身层面构建自己的伪装宇宙，并阐明形式并非固定不变这一事实，尽管在你们自己的层面上许多情况下它看似如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is not part of the particular camouflage necessities on that plane. Now. At other levels you exist and manipulate on other planes, which are consciously unknown to you, planes which are as valid as your own, and in which your existence is also a natural result of your own psychic makeup. I am referring here of course to all individuals.
quotes.translation: 它并非该层面特定伪装需求的一部分。现在。在其他层面上，你们存在于并操控着其他层面，这些层面你们有意识地未知，它们与你们自己的层面同样真实，而你们在这些层面的存在也是你们自身心灵构造的自然结果。我在此当然指的是所有个体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The subconscious has great and rather astounding effect in dimensions other than your own, and it sends vivid projections into these other perspectives, that appear there and are in their turn perceived in distorting manner by the outward camouflage senses of those inhabitants. And yet their inner senses give them hints of your reality.
quotes.translation: 潜意识在你们维度以外的其他维度中具有巨大且相当惊人的效应，它会向这些其他视角投射生动的影像，这些影像出现在那里，并被那些居民的外在伪装感官以扭曲的方式感知。然而，他们的内在感官会给他们关于你们实相的提示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For the thought shall seed the world and the world shall seed the universe. The cowering soul is, indeed, the soul who believes himself a physical being. He is therefore at the mercy of every physical camouflage. He does not realize that he is what he is. He must live in the world he has created, and it is a miserable and cruel world.
quotes.translation: 因为思想将播种世界，世界将播种宇宙。畏缩的灵魂，确实是那个相信自己只是物质存在的灵魂。因此，他受制于每一种物质伪装。他并未意识到他本来的面目。他必须活在他所创造的世界里，而这是一个悲惨且残酷的世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The nature of basic reality is known according to the degree to which it is directly experienced, and it can only be directly experienced through the use of the inner senses. The inner senses are of course utilized on your plane, as on any other, constantly. Without any such use no existence would be possible. And without the unconscious and constant use of the inner senses you could not even construct your precious camouflage patterned universe.
quotes.translation: 基本实相的本质取决于它被直接体验的程度，而它只能通过内在感官的使用来直接体验。内在感官当然在你们层面如同在其他任何层面一样被持续运用。没有这种运用，任何存在都不可能。若没有对内在感官的无意识且持续的运用，你们甚至无法构建你们那珍贵的伪装模式宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I will let you take your break, out of the goodness of my heart, and also so that I might have the benefit of your brilliant conversation between any material. I regret, and deeply, that we must still deal with concepts in terms of words strung out one before the other, for this method serves to reinforce your idea of continuity, cause and effect, past and present, and all such camouflages that I am completely determined to put into proper place.
quotes.translation: 我出于好心让你休息片刻，也为了能在任何资料之间聆听你精彩的对话。我深感遗憾，我们仍必须用前后串联的文字来阐述概念，因为这种方法强化了你们对连续性、因果、过去与现在等所有我决心彻底厘清的伪装概念的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Hypnosis is one method of examining dreams. Our method is perhaps the best one. The inner self constantly changes its focus. I have said that consciousness is merely the direction in which the inner self focuses at any particular time. In order to examine the reality of dreams it is necessary to change the focus of the inner self to those directions in which the inner self moves, when the ego does not limit its scope to camouflage reality only.
quotes.translation: 催眠是检视梦境的方法之一，而我们的方法或许是最佳的。内在自我不断转换其焦点。我曾说过，意识仅是内在自我在特定时刻聚焦的方向。要检视梦境的实相，必须将内在自我的焦点转向那些当自我不再局限于伪装实相时，内在自我所移动的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The emotions come closer than anything else to the vividness of inner data. There are of course more differences than similarities. However because of the intense quality of emotional experience this is still a good comparison. With the emotions however, there is in many cases a stimulus to action in the outside camouflage pattern.
quotes.translation: 情感比其他任何事物都更接近内在资料的生动性。当然差异多于相似之处。然而，由于情感体验的强烈特质，这仍是一个很好的比较。不过，在许多情况下，情感会引发外在伪装模式中的行动刺激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The point that I wanted to make is that in all instances energy, individualized energy, materializes itself on any, or within any, field through mental enclosures; which are of themselves not formed of any camouflage, but represent entry points formed of pure energy for its entrance and eventual manipulation within a given field.
quotes.translation: 我想强调的重点是，在所有情况下，个体化的能量通过心智围场在任何场域中或场域内物质化自身；这些围场本身并非由任何伪装构成，而是代表由纯粹能量形成的入口点，供其进入并在特定场域内最终运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This difference in immediacy is rather important for our consideration of the inner senses. This is also why I mentioned that the ears and the eyes, while connected with the body, are directed outward. They bring data to the body but very seldom do they collect data from the body. I am beginning to get into some material that is relatively difficult to explain, considering that I must take all of your camouflage patterns into consideration.
quotes.translation: 这种即时性的差异对我们探讨内在感官相当重要。这也是为何我提到耳朵和眼睛虽与身体相连，却朝向外在。它们将数据带入身体，但极少从身体收集数据。考虑到我必须兼顾你们所有的伪装模式，我现在要开始探讨一些相对难以解释的材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The durability is achieved because of constant expansion in terms of value fulfillment. Your camouflage physical universe does, necessarily, lead you to suppose that time exists in terms of past, present and future, simply because the idea or energy constructed into physical reality therefore operates under physical properties.
quotes.translation: 这种持久性是通过价值完成层面的持续扩张实现的。你们的伪装物质宇宙必然导致你们认为时间以过去、现在和未来的形式存在，这仅仅是因为被建构为物质实相的理念或能量因此必须遵循物质属性运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Like rats in mazes, with luck you could theoretically travel from one cube or maze to another, though practically this is impossible. But even if your experiments gave you knowledge of many of these camouflage cube universes, you would learn little of the basic uncamouflaged inner universe, where all such divisions disappear.
quotes.translation: 如同迷宫中的老鼠，理论上你或许能侥幸从一个立方体或迷宫移动到另一个，但实际上这绝无可能。但即便你的实验让你知晓许多此类伪装宇宙立方体，你仍难以触及那所有区隔皆消融的、未经伪装的内在基本宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These sessions represent what you might call previews of eternity, in that you are to some extent receptors of thought that is not hampered by time, and of a companionship that has not ceased with the stirring of the centuries, and with a valid emotional relationship that has escaped the camouflage aspect of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这些课代表着你所谓的永恒预览——在某种程度上，你成为不受时间阻碍的思想接收器，成为历经世纪流转仍未断绝的陪伴的接收器，并体验着已超越物质实相伪装层面的真实情感关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner self obviously needs the outer ego with its outer senses, in order to permit its own materialization in various camouflage forms. This should not be underrated or forgotten. Without the outer core, the inner self could simply not add to its own value fulfillment through participation in energy-constructs （hyphen）.
quotes.translation: 内在自体显然需要外在自我及其外在感官，才能以各种伪装形式实现自身物质化。这一点不应被低估或遗忘。若无外在核心，内在自体便无法通过参与能量建构（连字符）来增益自身的价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: At physical death, in your terms, the personality structure is able to approach certain coordinates, to perceive them, and to change focus from one system to another. When this occurs the primary physical construction, the camouflage material, loses its power. The individual would seem to disappear with no trace remaining.
quotes.translation: 在你们所谓的肉体死亡时，人格结构能够接近某些坐标，感知它们，并将焦点从一个系统转换到另一个系统。当这发生时，主要的物质结构，即伪装材料，便失去了力量。个体似乎会消失得无影无踪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is true that as a whole you do not as yet understand the inner senses intellectually. The part of yourself which you deny understands the inner senses well. But this does you no good at this stage of the game and so you are in the peculiar position, once more, of trying to dissect the inner world with camouflage tools.
quotes.translation: 确实，整体而言，你们尚未在理智上理解内在感官。你们所否认的那部分自己却十分了解内在感官。但在目前阶段，这对你们并无助益，因此你们再次处于一种奇特的位置，试图用伪装工具来剖析内在世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is actually a most dependable measure, as far as its attitude and condition is concerned, in that if it becomes overly concerned the concern is caused by a fear for its own survival. And its survival is obviously a necessity for existences within the physical field, if it is to deal effectively with camouflage reality.
quotes.translation: 就其态度和状况而言，这实际上是一种最可靠的衡量标准，因为如果它变得过度担忧，这种担忧源于对自身生存的恐惧。而它的生存显然是物理领域内存在所必需的，如果它要有效处理伪装实相的话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The reason I am using solidity here is that we are dealing with the world of camouflage, and sound waves and light waves are definite on your plane and can be measured. They are not solid as your tree is solid, but they are solid in degree. That is, they manifest themselves well enough to be recorded on your instruments.
quotes.translation: 我在此使用"坚固性"一词，是因为我们正在处理伪装世界，而声波与光波在你们的层面上是确定的、可测量的。它们不像你们的树木那样具有实体坚固性，但具有程度上的坚固性——也就是说，它们足以显现在你们的仪器上被记录下来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Free will as I mentioned earlier certainly does operate, but you must remember that while it does operate, personalities on your plane are extremely limited as to choice. They can only choose between alternatives with which they are familiar. They can only choose to operate within their own camouflage pattern framework.
quotes.translation: 正如我之前提到的，自由意志确实在运作，但你们必须记住：尽管它在运作，你们层面上的个体在抉择上受到极大限制。他们只能在熟悉的选项之间做选择，只能在自己的伪装模式框架内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The tree bark for example is not really divided from the rest of the tree, yet I must speak as if it were so divided because this is one of the apparent effects that you see, and I could not ignore what you insist was the evidence of your senses. The evidence of your senses is usually camouflage. Let that one sink in.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，树皮并非真的与树木其他部分分离，但我必须如此表述，因为这是你们所见的明显效果之一。我无法忽视你们坚持认为的感官证据——而感官证据通常就是伪装。请好好消化这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You can intellectually understand what I am telling you, but the brain （shaking head） cannot experience reality directly. This experience must come from the mind, through use of the inner senses. I want it understood that camouflage physical reality is indeed a reality, even while it is a distortion of something else.
quotes.translation: 你们可以理智地理解我所说的内容，但大脑（摇头）无法直接体验实相。这种体验必须来自心灵，通过运用内在感官。我希望你们明白，伪装物质实相确实是一种实相，即使它是对其他事物的扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There are unities, barely contemplated, then, between language, exterior communication, the physical nervous system, and time, or your idea of it. These merge so beautifully that they all serve to form a seemingly perfect picture of physical reality. The camouflage would not be effective were it less perfect. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 语言、外在沟通、物质神经系统与时间（或你们对时间的观念）之间存在着几乎未被深思的统一性。这些元素如此完美地融合，共同构成了物质实相看似完美的画面。若伪装不够完美，便无法生效。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We will maintain some sort of sensible consecutive nature here in the material, though the separation is of course arbitrary. Give us a moment. (Pause.) We will also be developing the God concept in terms of my choosing (amused), the pyramid consciousness gestalts of which I have spoken in the past. This will be given along with and as a part of the basic characteristics of reality, as divorced from camouflage materializations.
quotes.translation: 我们将在此材料中保持某种合理的连贯性，尽管这种划分当然是武断的。给我们一点时间。（停顿）我们还将以我选择的方式（带着笑意）发展神的概念，即我过去提及的金字塔意识完形。这将作为实相基本特性的一部分来阐述，与伪装物质化表现相分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I did want to answer Ruburt's question as to the expanding universe, though we will not go into all the details now. Your camouflage idea of time is no help, and until you realize that time as you think of it does not exist in any real terms, then you will not be able to understand the true nature of your universe.
quotes.translation: 我确实想回答鲁柏关于膨胀宇宙的问题，不过我们不会在此深入所有细节。你们对时间的概念化伪装毫无助益，除非你们意识到你们所认为的时间在真实层面并不存在，否则你们将无法理解宇宙的真实本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Inner data, even this, must make its entry through some distortion. We must always work together, but you must never consider me as an infallible source. This material is more valid than any material possible on your plane, but it is nevertheless to some degree conditioned by the camouflage attributes of the plane.
quotes.translation: 即便是内在资料，也必须通过某种扭曲才能进入。我们必须始终协同工作，但你们绝不能将我视为绝对可靠的源头。这些资料比你们层面可能获得的任何资料都更有效，但它在某种程度上仍受限于该层面的伪装属性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Emotions also are electrically coded, and also have an independent electrical reality. On a physical level they are both chemical and electrical. The validity and strength of emotions cannot be overestimated, for they represent in only slightly tinged form the uncamouflaged vitality of the universe as it passes through the inner self. Emotions represent, therefore, this vitality before it has been constructed into camouflage.
quotes.translation: 情绪同样以电性编码，并拥有独立的电性实相。在物质层面，它们兼具化学与电性特质。情绪的有效性与力量不可低估，因为它们以仅带轻微染色的形式，代表了宇宙未经伪装的活力流经内在自我时的样貌。因此，情绪代表了这种活力在被构建成伪装之前的原始状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Again, at best you get something like a mirror image which must be deciphered. This is rather difficult to get across to you. However, data received by the inner senses will have its own discernible impact upon the personality receiving it, and this impact is as strong as any impact caused by camouflage stimuli.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，你最多只能得到类似镜像的东西，而它必须被解读。这很难让你完全理解。然而，内在感官接收到的数据会对接收者的人格产生可辨识的影响，这种影响与伪装刺激造成的任何影响同样强烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now it is quite possible for the advanced personalities of which I have spoken to take upon themselves the camouflage of a particular system, enter it, become for, in quotes "a time" dependent upon its rules in order to help those who dwell within it; and this has been done on occasions too countless to mention.
quotes.translation: 现在，我提到过的那些高等人格完全有可能自行承担某个特定系统的伪装，进入其中，为了帮助居住其中的那些存在而暂时（加引号的"一段时间"）依赖其规则；这种事已经发生过无数次，多到无法计数。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner senses belong to you as inhibitors of a spontaneous inner reality universe. They, the inner senses, are your regardless of the particular camouflage plane you might inhabit at any given instance. Only by using the inner senses can you perceive while on your plane the inner reality of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 内在感官属于你，作为自发内在实相宇宙的抑制者。无论你在任何特定时刻可能栖身于何种伪装层面，这些内在感官都是你的。只有通过使用内在感官，你才能在你的层面上感知到它所属的内在实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You must remember here that time is part of the camouflage pattern. Now the outer sense of sight would seem to confound space, and seemingly conquer a portion of distance by using your eyes. That is, you do not necessarily have to walk a short distance in order to see what is in the particular space involved.
quotes.translation: 你必须记住，时间属于伪装模式的一部分。外在视觉看似混淆了空间，并借由使用你的眼睛似乎征服了部分距离。也就是说，你未必需要行走一小段距离才能看见特定空间内的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Ruburt was right. We shall call the eighth inner sense the sense of disentanglement; and it is one of the most basic inner senses. Complete disentanglement comes rarely on your plane, although it is possible to achieve it with training. Variations occur but usually some remnant of camouflage data is retained.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏说得对。我们将第八内在感官称为"解脱感官"，它是最基本的内在感官之一。在你们的层面上，完全的解脱虽可通过训练达成，却极为罕见。虽存在各种变体，但通常仍会保留部分伪装资料的残余。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Complications are far too intricate to explain to you. You form your image and the physical matter of your environment, and these, being action, are perceived as reality in other systems. They may not be perceived as physical objects, but as reality that conforms to the particular camouflage structure within.
quotes.translation: 其中的复杂性过于错综难解，无法向你解释。你形成自己的形象及环境的物质实相，这些作为"行动"的存在，在其他系统中会被感知为实相。它们可能不被视为物质客体，而是符合内在特定伪装结构的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Time is one of your most obvious camouflages, and the study of time will lead you in a fairly direct manner from the camouflaged physical self to the inner self, which you ignore. Even now your psychologists speak of the difference between physical time, by which you set your clocks, and psychological time.
quotes.translation: 时间是你最明显的伪装之一，对时间的研究将引导你以相当直接的方式，从伪装的物质自我走向被你忽视的内在自我。即便现在，你们的心理学家也在谈论物理时间（你们据此设定时钟）与心理时间之间的差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is as much camouflage as the glass on the table, （pointing） and its knowledge must come through the physical system. Now. The mind is uncamouflaged. It perceives the uncamouflaged reality of sense data, or its sees the energy that exists. It sees the energy independently of the physical object, you see.
quotes.translation: 它和桌上的玻璃杯一样是伪装（指向某处），其认知必须通过物质系统来获得。现在。心智是不伪装的。它感知感官资料的不伪装实相，或者说它看见存在的能量。它看见独立于物质客体的能量，你明白吗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now this does not mean that a stationary body of any kind cannot materialize itself upon another plane. And if it does, it of necessity must in some manner surround itself with the constructions or camouflage of the particular plane which it attempts to enter. This takes a high level of inner development.
quotes.translation: 现在这并不意味着任何静止的形体无法在另一个层面上物质化自身。而如果它确实如此，它必然必须以某种方式用它所试图进入的特定层面的构造或伪装来环绕自身。这需要高度的内在发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is therefore theoretically possible for you to see the world through a frog's eye, or a bird's or an ant's. We are speaking here of physical senses. The inner self has also latent inner senses beside the ones that it normally uses while the consciousness is tuned into a particular camouflage system.
quotes.translation: 因此理论上你有可能透过青蛙、鸟或蚂蚁的眼睛看世界。这里我们指的是物质感官。当意识调准到特定伪装系统时，内在自体除了通常使用的感官外，还潜藏着内在感官。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You would then encounter the heart of the camouflage area. The completely uncamouflaged areas at the outer edges of the various systems should remind you of the undifferentiated areas between various life cycles in the subconscious. This is no coincidence, as this general setup occurs in all realities.
quotes.translation: 接着你会遭遇伪装区域的核心。各系统外缘完全未伪装的区域，应当让你联想到潜意识中不同生命周期之间的未分化地带。这并非巧合，因为这种基本架构存在于所有实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Therefore the expanding universe implies a universe expanding in a more or less empty space, and this is not true. The phenomena that are given as evidence of this kind of expanding universe are the result of camouflage instruments, distortive ideas of time, and the resulting cause and effect theory.
quotes.translation: 因此膨胀宇宙论暗示着宇宙在某种近乎虚空的空间中扩张，但这并非事实。被当作这类膨胀宇宙证据的现象，其实是伪装仪器、扭曲的时间观念以及由此产生的因果理论所造成的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. In much the same manner as these atoms behaved, so also do other units behave, including large ones such as various field universes. Remember, no systems are really closed, but only appear so. There is however a resistance about or around such units, large or small; and it is this resistance through which a mental action must appear, and within which the characteristics or camouflages of the units operate.
quotes.translation: 现在。这些原子的行为方式，同样也适用于其他单位，包括各种场宇宙这样的大型单位。记住，没有任何系统是真正封闭的，只是看起来如此。然而，在这些大大小小的单位周围或附近存在一种阻力；正是这种阻力，精神行动必须穿透其中，而单位的特性或伪装也在其中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It means that the word is nothing, and that it is merely a symbol for that which you can neither see nor feel nor touch. It is merely a symbol for that small particle of yourselves which you permit your consciousness to perceive. It is a symbol to express that portion of an unseeable self, that is brought most obviously into operation for purposes of manipulation of the physical image within a camouflage field.
quotes.translation: 这意味着词语本身毫无意义，它只是你无法看见、感觉或触摸之物的象征。它只是你允许意识感知的那一小部分自我的象征。它是用来表达不可见自我的那一部分，这一部分为了在伪装场中操控物质形象而被最明显地调动起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This capsule comprehension I call capsule comprehension, since innate comprehension of itself and its workings is part of what you may think of as the fiber or makeup of all energy, regardless of any given particular form that it might take, or regardless of the camouflage it might form of itself.
quotes.translation: 这种胶囊式的理解我称之为胶囊理解，因为对其自身及其运作的内在理解，正是你所谓的构成所有能量纤维或结构的一部分，无论它可能采取何种特定形式，或无论它可能形成何种伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner senses can and do perceive this reality in an undistorted fashion. Your brain is itself a camouflage pattern. It can only translate and perceive what seems to be the evidence of the physical senses. It cannot step outside of itself. （Smile.） It is that which it attempts to investigate.
quotes.translation: 内在感官能够且确实以未扭曲的方式感知这个实相。你的大脑本身就是一个伪装模式。它只能翻译并感知那些看似是物质感官证据的东西。它无法跳出自身。（微笑。）它正是它试图探究的对象本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: If this were fully understood you see, then there would not be the necessity of looking for some god. I am certainly not going into the God concept at this time, though you can be certain that I will cover it thoroughly, since it is itself an idea camouflage covering something much different.
quotes.translation: 如果这一点被完全理解，你看，那么就没有必要去寻找某个神了。我现在当然不会深入探讨神的概念，尽管你可以确信我会彻底涵盖它，因为它本身就是一个伪装概念，掩盖着某种截然不同的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Contradictions, or rather apparent contradictions in terms will arise only out of a false conception on your part, mostly as a result of the erroneous cause- and effect system. Obviously cause and effect has only limited application even on your own plane and in your own camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 矛盾，或者更确切地说，表面上的矛盾，只会源于你们错误的概念，主要是由错误的因果系统导致的。显然，因果即使在你们自己的层面和你们自己的伪装宇宙中，也只有有限的应用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In dreams the inner "I" changes its point of focus, and this is important. It is therefore able to view the self as a whole, with its past and present life. And because the focus brings it outside of camouflage time and space, it is also able to project itself into what you call the future.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，内在的“我”会改变其焦点，这一点非常重要。因此它能够将自我视为一个整体，连同其过去与现在的人生。由于这个焦点将其置于伪装时空之外，它也能投射到你们所谓的未来之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are only various planes of existence in which energy wishes, or may wish, to manifest itself. The entity then projects a personality within that plane of existence, equipping it with whatever camouflage senses, mechanisms, and protections that are necessary for survival on that plane.
quotes.translation: 只存在各种不同的存在层面，能量在其中希望或可能希望展现自身。存有随后在该存在层面投射出一个人格，为其配备在该层面生存所必需的任何伪装感官、机制和保护。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The reality of the inner universe also does not exist basically in time as you conceive it, although in some instances parts of it may be glimpsed from the camouflage time perspective; only however a very small portion.
quotes.translation: 内在宇宙的实相基本上也不存在于你们所构想的时间之中，尽管在某些情况下，从伪装时间视角可能瞥见其部分，但仅仅是极小的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I wanted to give you this material because it is basic for any comprehension of mental acts as they occur in the dream universe and the universe of matter. There will also be additional information concerning the concept of time, as the experience of time is strongly connected with the motion of mental acts, as they are projected outward from their center into the fields of various camouflage systems.
quotes.translation: 我想提供这份资料，因为它是理解心灵活动在梦境宇宙和物质宇宙中如何运作的基础。此外，还会补充关于时间概念的信息，因为时间体验与心灵活动从中心向外投射到各种伪装系统场域的运动密切相关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This hidden self-consciousness can also at times look out through your outer senses upon your camouflage world. At these times you get something of the same effect as when you look through a telescope, and you may think of the long tube of the telescope as the channel of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 这种隐藏的自我意识有时也能透过你的外在感官看向你的伪装世界。在这些时刻，你会获得类似透过望远镜观察的效果，而你可以将望远镜的长管视为潜意识的通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is true that the difference is beyond words, that is the sense apparatus that you are trying to use, is much different than the outer apparatus with which you are familiar. The inner senses however give much stronger impressions than ones given by the outer senses. When we really progress in our sessions, you will have results that are as real as the outer camouflages that you take for granted.
quotes.translation: 确实，这种差异难以言喻——你试图使用的感知机制与你熟悉的外在机制截然不同。然而，内在感官带来的印象远比外在感官强烈得多。当我们的课程真正取得进展时，你将获得与那些你视为理所当然的外在伪装同样真实的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It also riddles your box through. Nevertheless, with your camouflage senses you perceive only that part of the concept that happens to fall within your box, and even then you receive and interpret such a concept with your outer senses, and therefore distort it out of all recognition.
quotes.translation: 它同样贯穿了你的框架。然而，凭借你的伪装感官，你只能感知到恰好落入你框架内的那部分概念，甚至你还会用外在感官接收并诠释这样的概念，从而将其扭曲得面目全非。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It does originate in the inner self that exists in your world, but is not of your world. The inner self-conscious ego as I have said--and this is for Philip's edification--the inner self-conscious ego can be compared to another face, looking out upon a different world. And yet it is the driving personality and force in your world, and you use its energy as you construct your camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 它确实源于存在于你们世界、却不属于你们世界的内在自我。正如我所说——这是为了启迪菲利普——内在自我意识自我可以比作另一张面孔，正注视着另一个不同的世界。然而它正是你们世界中的驱动性人格与力量，当你们构建伪装模式时，你们运用着它的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The temporary and apparent sense of freedom from the camouflage pattern often times leads the subject or student into a false sense of freedom from it in daily life, and causes a lack of ego discipline that should be maintained. Our method does not involve such dangerous territory.
quotes.translation: 暂时且表面地脱离伪装模式，常常会让受试者或学生在日常生活中产生虚假的解脱感，并导致本应保持的自我意识自律的缺失。我们的方法并不涉及如此危险的领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We will go into these laws, and outline others in future sessions. You will see also how the inner senses are equipped to perceive basic inner realities of the inner universe, in much the same manner that your outer senses are equipped to manipulate within your camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 我们将深入探讨这些法则，并在未来的课程中概述其他法则。你们也会看到内在感官如何被配备来感知内在宇宙的基本实相，正如你们的外在感官被配备来在你们的伪装宇宙中运作一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: For the same reason you are also obsessed with the idea of cause and effect, with the illusion of successive time bringing forth the other. Here we have two of your most basic idea camouflage structures: your conception of time as a succession, and your idea of cause and effect.
quotes.translation: 基于同样的原因，你们也执着于因果关系的概念，以及连续时间产生后续事件的幻相。这里我们有两个你们最基本的概念伪装结构：你们将时间视为连续性的概念，以及你们的因果观念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your scientists are correct in supposing that the universe is composed of the same elements that can be found on your plane. However, what they know as elements are of course particular camouflage patterns that may show themselves in a completely different form somewhere else.
quotes.translation: 你们的科学家假设宇宙由与你们层面相同的元素组成，这是正确的。然而，他们所知的元素当然只是特定的伪装模式，这些模式在其他地方可能以完全不同的形式显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It should be obvious that although an idea is born in time, after its conception it is free from time in a way that a spiders web can never be free from time. To the extent that a construction exists as camouflage, to that extent it is bound by and vulnerable to physical laws.
quotes.translation: 显而易见，虽然一个念头诞生于时间之中，但它在诞生后便以某种方式摆脱了时间的束缚，而蜘蛛网却永远无法摆脱时间。当某种建构作为伪装存在时，它在多大程度上受制于物理定律并易受其影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Knowledge automatically changes the personality and the camouflage structure through which it flows. Knowledge, in other words, is action. There is of course such action taking place in these sessions.
quotes.translation: 知识会自动改变人格及其流经的伪装结构。换言之，知识即是行动。这些课程中当然也发生着这样的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You will discover this by experiencing the idea directly, and you can best achieve some approximation of accomplishment by using psychological time. Your idea of experiencing a concept is doubtlessly to follow it through from beginning to end. Sweet tootsies, there is no beginning or end, and this idea of yours is the result of a complete and utter concentration upon camouflage time.
quotes.translation: 你将通过直接体验这个念头来发现这一点，而运用心理时间最能让你接近某种成就。你所谓体验一个概念的想法，无疑是要从头到尾追随它。亲爱的，根本没有开始或结束，你这种想法完全是专注于伪装时间的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You do not even perceive camouflage reality with your outer senses with any dependability. Telepathy, which belongs to the inner senses, is used constantly. Without it your languages would be meaningless. The inner senses, Philip, experience direct data instantaneously.
quotes.translation: 你们甚至无法可靠地透过外在感官感知伪装实相。属于内在感官的通心术被持续使用着。没有它，你们的语言将毫无意义。菲利普，内在感官能瞬间直接体验原始资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: But as you cannot find life by dissecting a frog, you cannot find this sort of distance by exploring space. When you dissect the frog you destroy that which you had been seeking. You are left with camouflage. Only by direct experience will anyone know of these matters.
quotes.translation: 但正如你们无法通过解剖青蛙找到生命，也无法通过探索空间找到这种距离。当你们解剖青蛙时，便摧毁了你们一直在寻找的东西。留下的只有伪装。唯有通过直接体验，任何人才能知晓这些事理。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is not to minimize the importance of the intellect that I once again repeat: Inner reality will only be known directly through the inner self, and the inner senses. The intellect must deal and interpret the realities of camouflage existence, this being its purpose.
quotes.translation: 我再次重申并非要贬低智性的重要性：内在实相只能透过内在自我与内在感官直接了知。智性必须处理并诠释伪装存在的实相，这正是其目的所在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You can see that in that fifth-dimensional existence there can be no constants as far as reference points are concerned, since by the very nature of the dimension, camouflages are adopted to fit numberless other dimensions as the structure itself continually changes.
quotes.translation: 你可以看出，在第五维度的存在中，就参考点而言不可能有任何恒常性，因为该维度的本质决定了伪装会随着结构本身的持续变化而适应无数其他维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Not only do you create a camouflage universe that is visible to your own outer senses, but you also create other planes of existence, such as the dream world for example, which to some extent is independent of you and yet dependent upon you in very basic ways.
quotes.translation: 你不仅创造了一个能被自己外在感官看见的伪装宇宙，还创造了其他存在层面，例如梦境世界，它在某种程度上独立于你，却又在非常基本的层面上依赖于你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Practicality is what works, if you will forgive the colloquialism. I will not attempt to tell you what to do. Make your own decision. But a man operates to capacity, and operates in a most practical manner within your own camouflage system when he is himself.
quotes.translation: 请原谅我用口语化的说法——实用性就是行之有效的东西。我不会试图告诉你该做什么。自己做决定吧。但当一个人做真实的自己时，他就能在自己的伪装系统内充分发挥能力，并以最实际的方式运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The person labeled schizophrenic, momentarily or for varying periods of time, lacks a certain kind of psychological veneer. This is not so much a basic lack of psychological finish as it is the adoption of a certain kind of (pause) psychological camouflage.
quotes.translation: 被贴上精神分裂症标签的人，在短暂或不同时段内，缺乏某种心理伪装。这与其说是基本心理结构的缺失，不如说是采用了某种（停顿）心理伪装系统。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: The brain, because of its purpose and its close connection to camouflage manipulation, does not have a primary existence within the electrical universe, although it has a secondary existence within it because of its connection to the purely electrical mind.
quotes.translation: 大脑因其目的及其与伪装操控的密切关联，在电性宇宙中并不具备主要存在性，尽管由于它与纯粹电性心智的连接，在其中具有次要存在性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You will ask me, then, the source of the wish to be. You will of course ask me the source of the source, and I will say again that only within the framework of your intense but limited camouflage universe does such a question have meaning or validity.
quotes.translation: 你接着会问我存在意愿的源头。你当然会追问源头的源头，而我将再次说明：只有在你们强烈却有限的伪装宇宙框架内，这样的问题才具有意义或有效性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Concentrating upon your own camouflage universe, you are able to distinguish only the distortive pattern, and from this pattern you deduce your ideas of cause and effect, past, present and future, and ideas of an expanding universe that floats ...
quotes.translation: 专注于你们自己的伪装宇宙时，你们只能辨识扭曲的模式，并从这个模式中推导出因果、过去、现在与未来的概念，以及一个漂浮着的膨胀宇宙的念头……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Not in the instance mentioned. Another method is somewhat more complicated and involves a diffusion of energies, a partially visible secondary camouflage body appearing in a new location, while the original body remains in its original position.
quotes.translation: 并非在所述实例中。另一种方法较为复杂，涉及能量的扩散，一个部分可见的次级伪装身体出现在新位置，而原身体仍留在原处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have also mentioned that as your outer senses can perceive the camouflage universe, and as they act within its laws, so also the inner senses are equipped to perceive the inner basic universe, and they directly are familiar with its laws.
quotes.translation: 我也曾提及，正如你们的外在感官能感知伪装宇宙，并在其法则内运作，内在感官同样被赋予感知内在基本宇宙的能力，且它们直接熟悉其法则。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I can perceive many other systems similar to your own. I cannot with any ease or facility enter into them in any familiar manner however, to experience camouflage as you do. (Pause.) This does not mean of course that I am not aware of you.
quotes.translation: 我能感知许多与你们相似的其它系统，但我无法轻易或自如地以熟悉的方式进入其中，像你们那样体验伪装。（停顿）这当然不意味着我意识不到你们的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You know then that you yourselves create your universe and that each generation creates it anew in its own image. There is a growth principle operating in the realm of ideas and in the construction of these ideas into camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 你们因此明白自己创造了你们的宇宙，每一代人都以自己的形象重新创造它。在理念领域以及将这些理念构建成伪装模式的过程中，存在一个成长原则在运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Later I will go into the creation of other planes, and remember also that as man creates his own camouflage pattern he also works out his problems on the stage of history, which is also his creation. This is a point worth remembering.
quotes.translation: 稍后我会探讨其他层面的创造，同时请记住：当人类创造自己的伪装模式时，也在历史的舞台上——这同样是他的创造——解决自身的问题。这一点值得铭记。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You can, or you will be able to, travel within your own camouflage universe. There are other intelligent identities in it and they are on your own plane. This is travel along what we may call for simplicity's sake a horizontal level.
quotes.translation: 你可以，或将会能够，在你自己的伪装宇宙中旅行。其中存在着其他有意识的身份，它们与你处于同一层面。为简便起见，我们可以称之为水平层面的旅行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: With your clock time it is very difficult for you to conceive of large concepts to begin with. You are forced to think using word symbols strung one before the other, and therefore you are imprisoned by a camouflage of continuity.
quotes.translation: 以你们的钟表时间，要开始理解宏大概念是极其困难的。你们被迫使用前后串联的文字符号来思考，因此被一种连续性的伪装所禁锢。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Since the outer senses or their equivalent are the main perceptrons of camouflage constructions, then the outer senses and the physical apparatus or its equivalent will habitually perceive its particular system as a closed one.
quotes.translation: 由于外在感官或其等同物是伪装结构的主要感知器，因此外在感官与物质机制或其等同物会习惯性地将其特定系统视为一个封闭系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: None of this goes on in any one level. There is great interplay, and as I mentioned in an earlier session, inward energy is itself transformed and affected and enriched by the camouflage forms or units that it produces.
quotes.translation: 这一切并非发生在单一层面。能量与形态之间存在巨大的交互作用，正如我在前次课程中提到的，内在能量本身会因其所产生的伪装形态或单元而转化、影响并丰富自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is possible but not inevitable, of course, that continued use of such drugs by certain types of personalities could over a period of time lead to complete disability to manipulate camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 当然，某些类型的人格若持续使用此类药物，经过一段时间后，有可能（但非必然）导致完全丧失操控伪装模式的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Yet this initial experience is not completed and it is not finished. And while it does not need expression through camouflage, it exists in a fuller and more vivid nature than you can at present imagine.
quotes.translation: 然而，这初始经验尚未完成，也并未终结。虽然它无需通过伪装来表达，但其存在的本质比你们目前所能想象的更为完整与生动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These moment points may, for simplicity's sake, also be thought of as reference points from one system to another. Do you see now a connection here with camouflage, as explained in early sessions?
quotes.translation: 为简化起见，这些瞬间点也可视为从一个系统到另一个系统的参考点。你现在是否看出这与早期课程中解释的伪装系统有所关联？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ideas and use of the inner senses can form a shaft of understanding through camouflage pattern, by which you will receive a dismally small burst of light; but even that is extremely important.
quotes.translation: 内在感官的理念与运用能形成一道穿透伪装模式的理解之轴，通过它你将接收到一束微弱得可怜的光线——但即便如此也极为重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The subconscious, it is true, has elements of its own distortions, but these are easier to escape than the tons of distortive camouflage atmosphere that weigh your scientific experiments down.
quotes.translation: 潜意识确实有其自身的扭曲元素，但这些比压垮你科学实验的沉重扭曲伪装氛围更容易摆脱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: What your scientists are perceiving is the form, the camouflage form, which the projections of the quasars take within your system.
quotes.translation: 你们的科学家所感知到的，是类星体投射在你们系统内所采取的形式，即伪装形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You are in touch with infinity in such undifferentiated areas, for it is only camouflage that gives you your conception of time.
quotes.translation: 在那些未分化的领域中，你们与无限相连，因为只有伪装才赋予你们时间的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Thoughts as offspring have a strong effect in all systems, and directly change the camouflage material of any system.
quotes.translation: 作为后代的思想在所有系统中都有强烈的影响，并直接改变任何系统的伪装材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: It is the effect of the camouflage which is responsible for the experience of time as you think of it.
quotes.translation: 伪装的效果造成了你们所认为的时间体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json
